title: Mjukvaruarkitekt
description:
**Om oss**  

På Techrytera AB börjar rekryteringen med dig. Vi är ett bemannings- och rekryteringsföretag med spetskompetens och ett tydligt fokus inom IT och Engineering. Med vår branschkunskap och nära dialog med både kandidater och kunder skapar vi träffsäkra matchningar där rätt kompetens möter rätt behov.


Vi tror att en riktigt bra matchning inte bara handlar om en rollbeskrivning – utan om dina erfarenheter, din potential och vad du faktiskt vill utvecklas inom. Därför utgår vi alltid från individen. Genom att förstå din bakgrund, dina drivkrafter och dina ambitioner kan vi koppla ihop dig med uppdrag och roller hos våra kunder där du får rätt förutsättningar att utvecklas och göra skillnad.


Vårt mål är att bygga långsiktiga och meningsfulla samarbeten – både för dig som kandidat och för våra kunder.  

  

**Arbetsbeskrivning**  

Kunden står inför en omfattande teknisk omställning där nuvarande Rakel-system successivt ska ersättas av det nya systemet SWEN, baserat på 3GPP MCX-arkitektur. Övergången planeras ske fram till 2030 och innebär betydande förändringar i hur kommunikationstjänster utvecklas, integreras och förvaltas.


För att möjliggöra en smidig migrering mellan systemen finns ett behov av att hantera gemensam funktionalitet genom ett Software Development Kit (SDK). Syftet är att skapa en enhetlig och återanvändbar plattform som kan nyttjas av flera system och applikationer inom organisationen. Uppdraget avser en förstudie med fokus på att analysera, designa och föreslå en målarkitektur för ett MCX-anpassat SDK. Du kommer att bidra med specialistkompetens inom området och arbeta nära interna intressenter, arkitekter och utvecklingsteam.


I uppdraget ingår att:

* Analysera befintliga system och deras kopplingar till Rakel och framtida SWEN-lösning
* Definiera kravbild och målarkitektur för ett MCX-baserat SDK
* Utvärdera tekniska lösningar och standarder inom 3GPP MCX
* Ta fram designförslag och rekommendationer för implementation
* Bidra till kunskapsöverföring och dokumentation


Arbetet sker i nära samarbete med olika delar av verksamheten och kräver god förståelse för både tekniska standarder och verksamhetsbehov.

**Kvalificeringskrav (Skallkrav):**
-----------------------------------


Du behöver ha minst 15 års erfarenhet som mjukvaruarkitekt.  

Du behöver ha minst 5 års dokumenterad erfarenhet av utveckling av system baserade på 3GPP MCX-arkitektur.  

Du behöver ha minst 5 års dokumenterad erfarenhet av SDK-utveckling för 3GPP MCX-system.  

Du behöver ha minst 15 års dokumenterad erfarenhet av kommunikationslösningar baserade på SIP/RTP/SRTP.  

Du behöver ha minst 15 års dokumenterad erfarenhet av apputveckling för iOS, Android och Windows.  

  

**Ansökan**  

När du söker via Techrytera AB söker du inte bara ett jobb – du påbörjar en dialog om din fortsatta karriär. Vi vill lära känna dig, din erfarenhet och dina ambitioner för att kunna matcha dig med rätt möjligheter hos våra kunder.


Låter det intressant? Skicka in din ansökan eller hör av dig till oss så berättar vi mer. Vi ser fram emot att hitta nästa steg i din karriär tillsammans med dig.

title: Software Engineer - Java
description:
**Om rollen**
-------------


Som utvecklare på Ticket jobbar du tillsammans med drivna, ödmjuka och riktigt skickliga kollegor i produktteam som utvecklar företagets tjänster och digitala affär. Arbetet innebär att bygga nytt, förbättra befintliga lösningar och vidareutveckla system kopplade till Tickets e-handelsplattform.


Det här är en roll för dig som gillar backend på riktigt och vill jobba nära tekniska utmaningar som faktiskt spelar roll. Vi hanterar miljardtals prissättningar varje dygn, med **höga krav på prestanda, tillgänglighet och svarstider på millisekundnivå**. Samtidigt har vi en utvecklingsmiljö med hög leveransförmåga och arbetar enligt principer som ligger i linje med **DORA DevOps Elite**, med snabba och trygga produktionssättningar.


Du kommer att jobba i en organisation med korta beslutsvägar, hög förändringstakt och stort mandat nära verksamheten. **Våra team och produktägare har mandat att agera – och gör det också**. Hos oss finns inga kommittéer, centrala arkitekturfunktioner eller andra lager som bromsar tempo och genomförande. Teamen bestämmer själva teknikval, arkitektur och hur lösningarna byggs. Det gör att det går snabbt från idé och beslut till verklig effekt i produktion.


Hos Ticket arbetar vi huvudsakligen med **Java, Spring Boot, AI, mikrotjänster, AWS, Kubernetes** och Vue.js. För den här rollen ligger tyngdpunkten främst inom backend. Vi bygger, vidareutvecklar och driftar vår egen plattform, vilket innebär att du kommer nära både tekniken, produkten och affären. Här finns gott om utrymme för dig som vill ta tekniskt ansvar, driva förbättringar och vara med och höja nivån, både i lösningarna vi bygger och i hur vi arbetar tillsammans.


Det vi bygger har dessutom en tydlig och inspirerande koppling till verkliga människor och riktiga behov. Vi är med och förverkligar det som för många är årets bästa tid – semesterresan. Det gör att du inte bara bygger tekniskt avancerade system, utan också en produkt som kunder faktiskt vill köpa och som hjälper dem hela vägen till sin resa.

**Om dig**
----------


Du har en **examen inom datavetenskap, systemvetenskap, civilingenjör eller motsvarande utbildning**, alternativt längre erfarenhet av utvecklingsarbete på professionell nivå. Du har **minst tre års erfarenhet av utveckling i Java**, även om det inte behöver vara ditt primära språk. Du får gärna ha en bred erfarenhet av olika språk och miljöer, men erfarenhet av Java och Spring är särskilt meriterande.


Du gillar att bygga effektiva, robusta och skalbara system och trivs i team där man både tar ansvar för sin egen leverans och hjälper varandra att bli bättre. Hos oss får du stora möjligheter att leda och driva utvecklingen av backend i våra miljöer, både genom egna initiativ och som tekniskt bollplank till andra. Som person uppskattar du att utmanas av ny teknik och tycker helt enkelt att kod är kul.


Du ser att AI har en självklar plats i modernt utvecklingsarbete och är **van att använda Claude Code eller liknande verktyg** som en naturlig del av hur du utvecklar. Du tycker om att diskutera lösningar, utmana tankar och dela med dig av din erfarenhet. Du drivs av att bygga bra saker tillsammans med andra duktiga människor och motiveras av miljöer där det finns höga ambitioner, stort förtroende och goda möjligheter att påverka. Du har goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift.

### **Hos Ticket**


Givetvis har du sex veckors semester, flex så vardagen fungerar, möjlighet till visst arbete hemifrån, full tjänstepension enligt ITP och **trevliga reseförmåner**. Ticket sitter i toppmoderna lokaler i Sickla, några minuter från Slussen. För Tickets anställda finns parkering utanför kontoret.


På Ticket är vi stolta över att vara ett företag med människor från olika bakgrunder. Vi vet att mångfald inte bara gör oss starkare, utan också mer innovativa, och att olika perspektiv gör oss mer kreativa. Vi strävar efter att vara en attraktiv arbetsplats som är fri från diskriminering och ger lika möjligheter för alla.


Som en del av rekryteringsprocessen får du göra ett personlighetstest och ett logiskt test för att vi ska kunna göra en rättvis och träffsäker bedömning. Det tar cirka 30 minuter totalt. En objektiv urvalsprocess möjliggör att alla kandidater bedöms på samma sätt, utifrån egenskaper som är relevanta för den aktuella tjänsten. Lönespann kan kommuniceras under intervjuprocessen och bakgrundkontroll sker innan anställning.

title: Software Engineer
description:
**Software, the fuel for mobility**  

  

We bring bold digital visions to life. So we’re on the lookout for more curious and creative engineers who want to create change – one line of high-quality code at a time. Our transformation isn't for everyone, but if you're excited about solving the leading-edge technological challenges facing the auto industry, then let’s talk about your next move.

**Let's introduce ourselves**
-----------------------------

  


The Manage Electrical Energy (MEE) team is responsible for developing Core System Platform apps for different functions such as, optimization of energy and power usage in the car. The responsibility spans from early concept to industrialization and follow-up in the field. The team is cross-functional and responsible for System Design, System Safety, SW development and Verification / Quality assurance.

**What you'll do**
------------------

  

* Develop software solutions according to functional requirements.
* Refine and further develop your software in HIL-rigs and in test vehicles.
* Learn, understand the business use-case and be part of creating functional requirements.
* Develop strategies, target levels and reliable solutions/verification methods regarding the function in question.
* Contribute to planning and follow up the integration of the function realization in close cooperation with all concerned teams and stakeholders in different program and projects.
* Contribute to the team’s test activities and update of test methods, tools and processes.

Support fault tracing and/or troubleshooting activities  
* 
**What you'll bring**
---------------------

  

**You and your skills**

  

* Master’s degree in Electrical Engineering, Computer Science or equivalent.
* Solid experience from software development using MatLab/SimuLink and C/C++
* Solid experience from testing in vehicles. Taking CAN-logs, using INCA and other tools.
* Solid knowledge from testing in HIL-rigs and from CI/CD.
* Experience from fault tracing in rigs and vehicles.
* Knowledge of Software Design work.
* Car Weaver / System Weaver knowledge.
* GIT, Gerrit and Zuul.
* Understanding of electrical systems and architecture in vehicles including ECU signaling.
* Knowledge within electronics in general like DC/DC and batteries (to understand the domain).
* Fluent in both written and spoken English.
* Swedish driving license B or equivalent.

  


**As a person**

  

* You are curious, eager to learn and exploring to innovate.
* You are customer focused and committed to deliver high quality.
* You are flexible and possess the ability to commence your tasks without having all the facts at hand before you start.
* You are organized and structured and possess excellent communication and documentation skills.
* You can build and maintain cross functional networks both within and outside your home organization to gain technical insights to learn as well improve way of working.
* You possess a balanced personality to be team oriented as well as being able to self-motivate.
  

**Volvo Cars. For Life.**  

  

For nearly a century, Volvo Cars has empowered people to move freely in a personal, sustainable and safe way. Today, we are driving bold advancements in electrification, sustainability and automotive safety. To realise our ambitious vision, we are seeking innovative minds who are ready to tackle the challenges of tomorrow – today.
  

  

At Volvo Cars, we believe extraordinary things are achieved by ordinary people with a passion for making a difference. If you’re inspired by the opportunity to help redefine the future of mobility, we invite you to be part of our journey.  

  

**Ready to take the next step?**  

  

Submit your CV in English and tell us why you’re the ideal candidate for a role at Volvo Cars. Applications must be received no later than 15th of May 2026. You will receive a confirmation email after your submission.  

  

For questions regarding the recruitment process, please contact Recruiter Radoslaw Piela at radoslaw.piela@volvocars.com. For specific questions about the position, please reach out to Hiring Manager Marcus Myrén at MARCUS.MYREN@VOLVOCARS.COM.  

  

As part of the recruitment process, the final candidates will undergo a background check.  

  

**We welcome your application!**
company_description: At Volvo Car Group, our vision is clear: "To be the world's most progressive and desired premium car brand".

title: Cloud Solution Architect for Power Platform
description:
Job Title:


Cloud Solution Architect for Power Platform
Job Description


We're Concentrix. The intelligent transformation partner. Solution-focused. Tech-powered. Intelligence-fueled.  

  

  

  

  

The global technology and services leader that powers the world’s best brands, today and into the future. We’re solution-focused, tech-powered, intelligence-fueled. With unique data and insights, deep industry expertise, and advanced technology solutions, we’re the intelligent transformation partner that powers a world that works, helping companies become refreshingly simple to work, interact, and transact with. We shape new game-changing careers in over 70 countries, attracting the best talent.  

  

  

  

The Concentrix Technical Products and Services team is the driving force behind Concentrix’s transformation, data, and technology services. We integrate world-class digital engineering, creativity, and a deep understanding of human behavior to find and unlock value through tech-powered and intelligence-fueled experiences. We combine human-centered design, powerful data, and strong tech to accelerate transformation at scale. You will be surrounded by the best in the world providing market leading technology and insights to modernize and simplify the customer experience. Within our professional services team, you will deliver strategic consulting, design, advisory services, market research, and contact center analytics that deliver insights to improve outcomes and value for our clients. Hence achieving our vision.  

  

  

  

Our game-changers around the world have devoted their careers to ensuring every relationship is exceptional. And we’re proud to be recognized with awards such as "World's Best Workplaces," “Best Companies for Career Growth,” and “Best Company Culture,” year after year.  

  

  

  

Join us and be part of this journey towards greater opportunities and brighter futures.  

**Cloud Solution Architect for Power Platform**

We are looking for a seasoned Power Platform Cloud Solution Architect with extensive experience in Power Platform development. This role emphasizes developing and implementing governance strategies, best practices, and customized Power Platform solutions. The ideal candidate will be skilled in leveraging the Power Apps and Power Automate Studio and Power Platform Admin Center to assist customers with architectural design, troubleshoot existing applications, and establish governance frameworks tailored to organizational needs.


**Qualifications**

* **Experience Level:** SME expert in Power Platform governance, administration, and Power Apps development.
* **Technical Expertise:** Advanced knowledge of Power Platform Admin Center and Center of Excellence Starter Kit configuration.
* **Power Platform Technologies:** Strong proficiency in Power Apps (Canvas and especially Model Driven Apps), Power Automate (cloud and especially desktop flows), Dataverse, Power Pages and other Power Platform components.
* **Enterprise Focus:** Demonstrated experience in Power Platform administration and support within large-scale environments.
* **Training & Troubleshooting:** Skilled in delivering technical training and resolving complex application issues.
* **Problem-Solving & Collaboration:** Excellent analytical and collaboration skills.
* **Communication:** Strong ability to engage with key stakeholders and cross-functional teams.
* **Certifications:** Advanced Microsoft certifications preferred.
* **Consulting Experience:** Previous customer-facing roles are highly desirable.
* **Continuous Learning:** Strong commitment to staying updated on modern engineering practices and tools.

**Required Skill Set**

**Power Platform Development**

* Develop and maintain Power Apps solutions with a focus on model driven apps development and architecture.
* Development of Power Pages.
* Knowledge of Application Lifecycle Management (ALM) via Solutions.
* Experience in setting up, troubleshooting and optimizing Power Automate desktop flows.
* Familiarity with integrating data from Dataverse, SharePoint, and other sources.
* Ability to provide technical training and guide customers through architectural decisions for custom Power Apps solutions.

**Power Platform Administration & Governance**

* Administer and support Power Platform environments, including Power Apps, Power Automate, and Power Platform Admin Center (PPAC).
* Deep understanding of Dataverse, governance strategies, environment planning, and security.
* Expertise in developing environment strategies (environment types, purpose, security roles).
* Proficiency in licensing (standard vs. premium), capacity planning, and Data Loss Prevention (DLP) policies.
* Analytical skills for reporting and data analysis within PPAC and M365 audit logs.
* Capable of establishing and managing a Power Platform Center of Excellence (CoE).

**Desired Skill Set**

**Dynamics 365 Customer Engagement**

* Up to date product knowledge in Dynamics 365 Customer Engagement modules:
	+ Dynamics 365 Sales
	+ Dynamics 365 Customer Service
	+ Dynamics 365 Customer Insights – Journeys
	+ Dynamics 365 Field Service

**Dynamics CRM On-premises**

* Enterprise level administration and development focused specifically with:
	+ CRM infrastructure installation and configuration
	+ CRM deployment configuration
	+ CRM customization and configuration (Data model, forms, views, JavaScript, C# .NET, plugins, workflows)
	+ CRM integration
	+ Dynamics CRM Cloud Migration
* Knowledge in CRM 2015+ build versions and upgrade experience
* Architectural experience for Dynamics CRM on-premises
* A strong understanding of business application performance tuning which includes an understanding of SQL, IIS (Internet Information Services), Networking, and client-side troubleshooting.
* Environment health assessment experience

This role is ideal for individuals passionate about empowering organizations through innovative and secure Power Platform solutions while championing best practices in governance and administration.


Location:


SWE Work-at-Home
Language Requirements:


Time Type:


Full time

title: Dynamics 365 Finance & Operations Solution Architect
description:
Job Title:


Dynamics 365 Finance & Operations Solution Architect
Job Description


We are seeking an experienced Dynamics 365 Finance & Operations Solution Architect with a strong technical background across Dynamics F&O cloud, hybrid, and on premises solutions. The successful candidate will play a key role in the design, development, optimization, and stabilization of Dynamics F&O deployments, working closely with customers to drive measurable business value.


The candidate must have proven experience in customer facing roles, along with project delivery and technical leadership experience, and a demonstrated ability to lead in depth technical architecture discussions with customer executives, solution architects, IT leadership, enterprise architects, and development teams. This role requires the ability to translate complex technical concepts into clear architectural decisions that align with customer goals. The candidate should also be open to travel to customer sites as required by business needs.


Experience Profile & Customer Centricity


* Extensive experience with Dynamics 365 Finance & Operations, including Finance and Supply Chain Management, with hands on exposure to on premises, hybrid, and cloud environments.
* Strong understanding of ERP system architecture and best practices, with the ability to design and guide scalable, secure, and enterprise grade solutions.
* Deep expertise in the technical and functional aspects of Dynamics 365 F&O, including core business processes across finance and supply chain.
* Proven experience with customization and development in Dynamics 365 F&O, as well as ERP implementations and ongoing system management, including integration with third party systems.
* Ability to lead in depth technical discussions and provide clear architectural guidance to customers, architects, IT leadership, and development teams throughout design and implementation phases.
* Strong customer centric mindset, consistently driving positive customer satisfaction and establishing credibility as a trusted advisor by leveraging deep Dynamics 365 F&O, Supply Chain, and on premises expertise to deliver against defined Customer Success Plan outcomes.
* Demonstrated ability to actively listen, challenge constructively, and guide customers toward the best technical and business decisions.
* Experience providing actionable insights and feedback from customer engagements to Microsoft engineering teams, product groups, and internal stakeholders, contributing to continuous improvement and influencing product direction.

Business Impact


* Accelerate usage, value realization, and ROI of Microsoft Business Applications by advising technical and business decision-makers on architecture, implementation best practices, operational excellence, and performance efficiency—spanning both on prem and cloud connected deployments.
* Identify and resolve blockers preventing go live, scale, or adoption by applying deep technical knowledge of Dynamics F&O, integrations, performance tuning, and data migration. Deliver all engagements using Microsoft recommended methods and repeatable IP.
* Identify growth opportunities by understanding customer needs, business models, and workloads, and positioning relevant Microsoft Business Applications capabilities, including Supply Chain, Warehouse Management, and modernization pathways from on prem to cloud.

Technical Leadership


* Demonstrate a growth-mindset by continuously strengthening your technical depth in Dynamics 365 F&O, on prem infrastructure, Supply Chain, Warehouse Management, and related tooling to meet evolving customer and regional needs.
* Accelerate customer outcomes by engaging with technical communities, contributing to reusable IP, sharing best practices, and promoting knowledge re use within the Dynamics ecosystem.
* Lead or co lead architecture sessions, performance deep dives, solution design reviews, and readiness workshops to uplift customer capability and ensure long term operational health.

Qualifications


Technical Requirements


Core Technical Expertise


* 8+ years of hands-on experience implementing, customizing, optimizing, and supporting Dynamics 365 Finance & Operations (F&O), with strong exposure to on premises, hybrid, and cloud-based deployments.
* Strong understanding of Dynamics 365 Finance & Operations architecture, including application layers, data models, extensibility framework, and overall environment topology.
* Proven experience leading Dynamics F&O migration and modernization initiatives, including upgrades from legacy Dynamics AX and transitions to cloud first architectures.
* Deep expertise in performance troubleshooting, with the ability to diagnose and resolve bottlenecks across application, database, and infrastructure layers.
* Practical experience with ERP system administration and operational best practices for F&O environments, including monitoring, capacity planning, and production readiness.
* Demonstrated capability to perform end to end environment health assessments and performance audits, and to design and execute remediation and optimization plans, particularly for on premises and hybrid F&O environments.
* Strong experience designing, building, and troubleshooting integrations for Dynamics F&O, leveraging:

o Data Management Framework (DMF)


o Azure Logic Apps


o Power Platform


o APIs and other enterprise interfacing techniques


* Proficiency in Dynamics 365 F&O development and customization, including:

o X++


o Visual Studio


o .NET Framework


o Extension based development best practices


* Familiarity with software development lifecycle (SDLC) methodologies, including the use of Lifecycle Services (LCS) and Azure DevOps for implementation, maintenance, and release management.
* Experience with version control and development tools (e.g., Azure DevOps, GitHub) and working knowledge of CI/CD practices in enterprise ERP environments.
* Solid understanding of security, compliance, and access control requirements in ERP systems.
* Proficiency in documenting technical designs, system configurations, and operational procedures.
* Strong analytical skills with the ability to troubleshoot and resolve complex technical issues effectively.
* Good understanding of Azure cloud technologies and their implications for ERP scalability, security, performance, and operations.

Solution Architecture & Implementation


* Proven experience acting as Technical Architect / Lead Engineer for full lifecycle Dynamics 365 F&O programs, including design, build, test, deploy, and stabilization phases.
* Strong capability to design enterprise grade, scalable, and secure F&O implementations aligned with customer and business requirements.
* Demonstrated ability to lead deep technical discussions with customers, partners, and engineering teams covering architecture, integrations, data, security, and performance.
* Skilled in delivering technical workshops, training sessions, and hands on guidance to customer IT and development teams.

Operational Excellence & Troubleshooting


* Proven expertise in troubleshooting complex production issues in enterprise Dynamics 365 F&O environments.
* Strong focus on operational stability, reliability, and continuous improvement of live ERP systems.

Language Qualifications


* English: Fluent (reading, writing, and speaking) — mandatory.
* Swedish is strongly recommended as the primary working language for customer engagements in the Nordic market.
* Any additional Nordic languages are considered a plus for cross regional collaboration.

Interpersonal & Customer Engagement Requirements


* Exceptional interpersonal, presentation, and communication skills — able to confidently engage with customers, translate complex technical topics into clear guidance, and build strong, trust based relationships.
* Strong project management capability — able to lead customer conversations, drive clarity in scope and timeline, coordinate with stakeholders, and guide the customer’s project toward successful delivery.
* Strong collaboration skill with both internal and external stakeholders

Security & Onsite Support Requirements


* Ability to meet Microsoft, customer, and/or government security screening requirements is mandatory for this role.
* The successful candidate must have, or be able to obtain, a security certificate entitling access to classified information at the following levels or higher: “SECRET, NATO SECRET, SECRET UE / EU SECRET”
* Ideally, the candidate holds Swedish citizenship, as it significantly supports eligibility and processing for required Nordic security clearances.
* This role also requires onsite support, and the frequency of onsite presence will depend on customer needs, including critical project phases, escalations, workshops, or deployments. Flexibility to travel within the Nordic region is expected.

Additional Preferred Requirements (If you have the following skillsets, it is a plus)


* Certification or formal training in Dynamics 365 Finance & Operations, including administration, development, or solution architecture.
* Knowledge of Dynamics 365 Customer Engagement (CE), including solution architecture, customization concepts, integration patterns, and functional understanding across core CE workloads such as Sales and Customer Service.
* Experience with Microsoft Azure services and an understanding of how Azure capabilities support, extend, and integrate with Dynamics 365 Finance & Operations.
* Broader Dynamics 365 ecosystem awareness, with the ability to understand how CE, Dynamics AX, and F&O interact across hybrid, upgrade, and migration scenarios, including data flow and integration dependencies.
* Knowledge of Microsoft Dynamics AX, including AX architecture, module structure, and data model fundamentals, with the ability to support, troubleshoot, or collaborate effectively with AX focused engineering teams.
* Dynamics 365 Supply Chain Management (SCM) exposure, including familiarity with inventory, procurement, master planning, or production processes.
* Warehouse Management (WMS) functional and/or technical knowledge, including WHS configuration, mobile device workflows, location directives, work templates, and advanced warehouse operations.
* Experience with data migration and data transformation projects, particularly in ERP modernization or platform transition initiatives.
* Familiarity with business intelligence and reporting tools, such as Power BI, and their use in ERP reporting and operational insights.
* Exposure to non Microsoft ERP platforms (e.g., SAP, Oracle) and the ability to understand and compare enterprise ERP architectures is considered a plus.
* Familiarity with Power Apps development and customization.

 Requirements

title: Junior Associate - Tech & AI
description:
**Who You'll Work With**
 Driving lasting impact and building long-term capabilities with our clients is not easy work. You are the kind of person who thrives in a high performance/high reward culture - doing hard things, picking yourself up when you stumble, and having the resilience to try another way forward.
   

  

 In return for your drive, determination, and curiosity, we'll provide the resources, mentorship, and opportunities you need to become a stronger leader faster than you ever thought possible. Your colleagues—at all levels—will invest deeply in your development, just as much as they invest in delivering exceptional results for clients. Every day, you'll receive apprenticeship, coaching, and exposure that will accelerate your growth in ways you won’t find anywhere else.
   

  

 When you join us, you will have:
   

  

* Continuous learning: Our learning and apprenticeship culture, backed by structured programs, is all about helping you grow while creating an environment where feedback is clear, actionable, and focused on your development. The real magic happens when you take the input from others to heart and embrace the fast-paced learning experience, owning your journey.
* A voice that matters: From day one, we value your ideas and contributions. You’ll make a tangible impact by offering innovative ideas and practical solutions, all while upholding our unwavering commitment to ethics and integrity. We not only encourage diverse perspectives, but they are critical in driving us toward the best possible outcomes.
* Global community: With colleagues across 65+ countries and over 100 different nationalities, our firm’s diversity fuels creativity and helps us come up with the best solutions for our clients. Plus, you’ll have the opportunity to learn from exceptional colleagues with diverse backgrounds and experiences.
* World-class benefits: On top of a competitive salary (based on your location, experience, and skills), we provide a comprehensive benefits package to enable holistic well-being for you and your family.


**Your Impact**
 As a junior associate, you will join a client service team and take ownership of a workstream to solve some of the toughest challenges our clients face.
   

  

 Your clients aren’t just any clients, they're some of the most influential organizations around, from Fortune 500 giants to innovative startups. We will expect you to go the extra mile, delivering solutions that solve immediate problems and drive long-term change, and we’ll rely on your judgment and integrity to ensure our recommendations are effective and long-lasting.
   

  

 You will take on a role that goes beyond advising. You’ll be at the heart of the action—helping to uncover the true challenges behind a client’s strategy and creating actionable plans that drive real change. Working alongside clients and other McKinsey colleagues, you’ll combine research, analyzing data, interviews, and brainstorming to generate fresh insights and breakthrough solutions. Your commitment to our values will be crucial in earning our clients' trust and delivering results that matter.
   

  

 As you collaborate directly with clients, you’ll help them solve problems, refine strategies, and implement transformations. By equipping them with the tools and knowledge to continue innovating and improving after we’ve left, you’ll ensure the impact of our work endures. In doing so, you’ll uphold McKinsey’s commitment to making a meaningful difference in the industries and communities we serve.
   

  

 Our consultants within our Tech & AI practice help clients unlock the power of AI at scale, modernize technology delivery, and build new businesses to fuel growth.
   

  

**Your Qualifications and Skills**
**Read more about our work here.**
* Degree in technical subjects such as computer science, engineering, IT, hard sciences, physics or mathematics; advanced degree is a plus
* Excellent organizational capabilities, including the ability to initiate tasks independently and see them through to completion
* Proficient in rational decision making based on data, facts, and logical reasoning
* Ability to create work product-focused materials / outputs, which may include PowerPoint decks, Excel models, articles, or other written deliverables
* Exceptional time management to meet your responsibilities in a complex and largely autonomous work environment
* Ability to work or attend meetings outside of traditional business hours or take on projects with limited or no notice at times
* Ability to travel to and work in varying environments that may be challenging and/or not accessible (e.g., factories, hospitals, mines)
* Strong communication skills, both verbal and written, in English, with the ability to adjust your style to suit different perspectives and seniority levels

title: Cloud Network specialist | SEB, Sweden
description:
Join our innovative team to shape the future of cloud networking within SEB’s progressive tech landscape. You’ll drive network development for our GCP and Azure environment, making a tangible impact in a collaborative, agile setting.
   

  

 SEB is more than just a bank with an IT function. We are a progressive tech company powered by innovation and fuelled by collaboration. From COBOL to AI and everything in between, we offer you an impressive tech stack and several technology paths. Together we’re innovating for a sustainable society and building the tech arena of the future, a welcoming space for everyone. Are you ready to take on a new challenge? If so, you’ll be interested in this opportunity!
   

  

 About the role:
   

  

 As a Cloud Network Specialist, you will primarily manage network related topics within our Core & Cloud team, developing and maintaining its infrastructure, including Network Security and automation. You’ll balance maintenance with new development in an agile framework, continuously striving for process improvements, standardization, and automation for speed and precision. We value your commitment to sharing knowledge, ensuring secure solutions, and minimizing overlapping functionality. You will also apply analytical thinking to identify and resolve complex technical challenges and collaborate flexibly across virtual teams.
   

  

 In this role work on-call during nights and weekends every 4-6 weeks and from time-to-time maintenance work outside office hours will be included.
   

  

 To thrive in this role, we believe you have:
   

  

* Proficiency in cloud networking across GCP and Azure environments.
* Advanced understanding of network technology disciplines including IP Routing, Switching, Routing Protocols, WAN, Firewall, and Packet Analysis.
* Strong experience with automation tools like Terraform/ARM and Ansible, plus working in Gitlab or similar.
* Knowledge in programming using Python, Bash, PowerShell or similar scripting languages.
* Excellent collaboration skills, the ability to work independently and confidently, and a commitment to analytical thinking for problem-solving.


**What we offer:**
* Agile and modern ways of working
* A flat hierarchy and openness to share ideas, opinions and points of views
* Extensive training and learning opportunities
* Hybrid work model, meaning remote work is possible up to 2 days/week
* Innovative company at the forefront of technology


**Do you want to be part of SEB?**
 It is our fundamental belief that inclusion and diversity is crucial for our future success. We strive to have an inclusive, value-driven culture where employees feel valued, respected, and involved irrespective of who they are, what they believe or where they come from.
   

  

 Since we select candidates continuously, feel free to send in your application today via the link in this ad, but no later than 2026-04-16. If you have questions about the position, please contact Ronnie Andersson, ronnie.andersson@seb.se, note that we will not process applications via email.
   

  

 Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks, company engagements and history of crime. In some cases, we also apply random drug checks. During employment, employees within SEB can also expect to undergo recurring background checks.
   

  

 SEB Sweden has a redeployment responsibility, which means that this position might be covered by internal redeployment.

title: IT Lead – Internal IT & Infrastructure
description:
Blykalla is scaling quickly as we industrialize our Small Modular Reactor (SMR) technology. As our organisation grows, the systems, infrastructure, and security that support our daily work need to grow with us.
   

  

 We are now looking for an IT Lead who will take ownership of how internal IT is structured, operated, and continuously improved across the organisation.
   

  

 Today, we are close to 110 people, with our headquarters in Stockholm and a newly established office in the United States. In this role, you will play a key part in ensuring that our digital workplace, IT infrastructure, and internal systems remain secure, reliable, and scalable as we continue to grow.
   

  

 If you enjoy building structure, improving systems, and enabling teams to work effectively, this could be the role for you.
   

  

**What We Do At Blykalla**
 Blykalla is developing the next generation of nuclear technology with our lead-cooled advanced Small Modular Reactor (SMR). Our goal is to deliver reliable, scalable, and fossil-free energy for industries and societies that need stable power.
   

  

 Our technology is based on decades of research and combines innovative fuel, materials, and reactor design to enable safe and efficient nuclear power generation.
   

  

**About The Role**
 Today, internal IT at Blykalla is handled through a combination of IT support and external vendors. As the company grows, we need to move from a reactive support model to a structured, secure internal IT environment.
   

  

 In this role, you will own and develop Blykalla’s internal IT infrastructure and security, ensuring that our systems, networks, and tools support the company as we scale toward 200+ employees and multiple international offices.
   

  

 You will work closely with teams across the organization and help ensure that our IT environment is secure, reliable, and scalable.
   

  

**Your Responsibilities**
* Own and develop Blykalla’s internal IT environment and infrastructure
* Define and implement IT policies, standards, and best practices
* Strengthen and manage the company’s IT security and cybersecurity practices
* Manage identity and access management across systems and tools
* Oversee internal IT infrastructure, including devices, networks, and systems
* Ensure a scalable IT setup that supports growth and international expansion
* Support and structure the company’s IT support function
* Collaborate with external IT vendors and service providers
* Support onboarding and offboarding processes from a systems perspective
* Help ensure secure and reliable operations across offices in Sweden and the US
* Manage and maintain our Linux-based server infrastructure
* Own the relationship with our external network partner, understand the existing setup, troubleshoot day-to-day issues independently, and engage the vendor for larger changes or incidents
* Manage VPN access, including setup, provisioning, and ongoing administration


**Who you are**
 This role suits someone who enjoys building structure and taking ownership of internal IT environments in a growing organisation.
   

  

 You combine technical understanding with a pragmatic approach to solving problems and improving systems. You enjoy working close to both people and technology and understand how reliable IT infrastructure enables teams to work effectively.
   

  

 You are comfortable taking responsibility for systems and improvements while collaborating across teams to ensure that solutions work in practice. We believe you have:
   

  

* Experience managing internal IT environments in a growing organization
* Strong understanding of IT infrastructure, systems administration, and networking
* Experience working with IT security and cybersecurity practices
* Experience managing identity and access management
* Experience with cloud-based environments and modern SaaS ecosystems
* Ability to structure processes and build scalable systems
* Strong problem-solving skills and a proactive mindset
* Comfort working across technical and non-technical teams


**It’s a Plus If You Also Have**
* Experience scaling IT in a fast-growing company
* Experience working in an international organization
* Experience building IT policies and governance structures
* Experience working with Google Workspace environments
* Experience from tech, deep-tech, or engineering-driven companies


**What We Offer**
* A key role in building the internal IT foundation of a rapidly growing company
* The opportunity to shape how IT and security are structured at Blykalla
* A collaborative and ambitious team working on cutting-edge energy technology
* A workplace where curiosity, responsibility, and collaboration are highly valued
* The chance to contribute to a sustainable energy future


**Location**
 This position is based in Stockholm, and we prefer someone who can work on-site to support our office environment and collaborate closely with teams.
   

  

**So, what do you think?**
 If you’re excited about building scalable IT systems in a fast-growing company working on next-generation nuclear technology, we would love to hear from you. Together, we’re building the systems, infrastructure, and organisation needed to deliver the next generation of nuclear power.
   

  

 We are proud to foster an inclusive workplace free from discrimination. We strongly believe that diversity of experience, perspectives, and background will lead to a better environment for our employees and a better product.
   

  

**We do not accept applications via email.**
 We are not open to external help from recruitment agencies.

title: IT Manager
description:
We are looking for a hands-on IT Manager who is passionate about AI and ready to own our global IT and security operations. If you love the intersection of cutting-edge AI, IT infrastructure, and security, this is your role.
 



  





**About SeenThis** 




 The open web has massive untapped advertising potential, but video has historically underperformed here. SeenThis is changing that. As a video advertising partner, we prove the open web delivers exceptional results, capturing more attention with cost-effective video that keeps publishers profitable and the internet independent. Since 2017, we've served billions of streams for 5,000+ brands across 50+ countries. We believe brands deserve reach wherever audiences are, publishers deserve sustainable revenue, and the internet deserves to stay open.
 



 Our team of 130+ employees works globally from offices in Stockholm, Oslo, London, Paris, Singapore, Hong Kong, New York, and Sydney. We're expanding across all teams and constantly seeking new colleagues who want to make real impact in a fast-moving, collaborative environment where innovation happens daily. Do you want to be part of our journey, where we dare to discover, own it, and win together?
 



 Join SeenThis!
 



  





**About The Role** 




 As the IT Manager at SeenThis, you will own our global IT and security operations while playing a central role in our top company priority: internal AI transformation. Reporting to the COO, you will be the person who ensures our teams have the right tools, secure infrastructure, and – increasingly – AI-powered workflows that make them more productive.
 



 Day to day, you will work closely with colleagues across the company to understand their needs and help them implement AI solutions that can partly or fully automate their workflows. You will test, give feedback on, and help train our internal AI solutions, and assist the COO in executing the AI transformation roadmap.
 



  





 Beyond AI, you will manage our full IT landscape: maintaining an optimized software suite, acting as system owner for core platforms like Google Workspace, Slack, Notion, Claude, and Jamf, and leading procurement projects for software and hardware from start to finish. You will run our global hardware operations – from procurement and configuration to onboarding, troubleshooting, and offboarding – and maintain our MDM system as well as the local IT infrastructure at our Stockholm HQ, including network and AV.
 



  





 On the security side, you will ensure compliance with the IT and security-related controls in our SOC2 framework, coordinate audits and due diligence requests from external stakeholders, and develop day-to-day security operations including risk assessments, incident resolution, and security awareness training.
 



 We are looking for someone who keeps IT costs at an acceptable level, negotiates prices, ensures licenses go only to those who need them, and always applies the principle of least privilege. Above all, you stay open-minded, help out beyond your role description when needed, and strive to live by SeenThis' values.
 



  





**Qualifications** 



* Genuine interest in AI and practical experience applying AI tools to improve internal workflows
* Proven experience in an IT management or senior IT operations role, ideally in a global SaaS or tech company
* Strong hands-on experience administering SaaS platforms such as Google Workspace, Slack, Notion, and MDM solutions (e.g. Jamf)
* Solid understanding of IT security principles, SOC2 compliance, and risk management
* Experience with software and hardware procurement, license management, and vendor negotiations
* Demonstrated ability to drive adoption of new technologies and tools across a non-technical user base
* Strong communication skills and the ability to work cross-functionally with stakeholders at all levels
* A structured, proactive, and hands-on approach – you're comfortable owning both strategy and execution



  





**Preferred Qualifications** 



* Experience working with or supporting AI-powered internal tools and platforms
* Familiarity with SOC2 audit processes and coordination with external auditors
* Experience managing AV and network infrastructure in an office environment
* Background in security awareness training programs
* Experience in a scale-up environment with 100–300 employees across multiple geographies



  





**Application** 




 As we review applications and interview on a continuous basis, please apply as soon as possible. Due to the high volume of applications received, we are unable to provide personalized feedback prior to the interview stage. Thank you for understanding!
 



  





 We conduct background checks on all SeenThis-hires to comply with our customers and protect business-critical information.
 



  





 We look forward to welcoming you to SeenThis!

title: IT‑support (sommarjobb)
description:
**Om Onitio**
 Onitio är en nordisk IT-koncern som ägs av det norska investmentbolaget Aars, med cirka 1 500 medarbetare, varav omkring 500 i Sverige. Vi levererar innovativa IT-tjänster och lösningar inom tre affärsområden:
   

  

* Onitio Technology Services – installation, support och underhåll
* Onitio Workforce Services & Consulting – bemanning och flexibel resursförsörjning inom IT
* Onitio Solutions – digital transformation och IT-innovation


 Med kontor från Malmö till Luleå kombinerar vi teknisk kompetens med innovation och starkt kundfokus. Hållbarhet är en viktig del av vår verksamhet – exempelvis består 98 % av vår fordonsflotta av elbilar.
   

  

 Hos Onitio blir du en del av ett dynamiskt nordiskt team där mångfald och inkludering är centrala värden.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Till sommaren söker vi IT‑supportmedarbetare för uppdrag hos våra kunder i centrala Stockholm under perioden vecka 27–33.
   

  

 I rollen som IT‑support arbetar du ute hos kund, nära verksamheten och användarna, där du hjälper till att lösa IT‑relaterade frågor direkt på plats. Rollen är praktisk och serviceinriktad och passar dig som trivs med att arbeta hands‑on, ta ansvar och bidra till en fungerande IT‑vardag i en professionell miljö.
   

  

**Dina arbetsuppgifter**
 I rollen kommer du bland annat att arbeta med att:
   

  

* Ge IT‑support till användare gällande hårdvara och mjukvara
* Felsöka och åtgärda tekniska problem på plats
* Installera, konfigurera och underhålla datorer och annan IT‑utrustning
* Hantera och hålla ordning på IT‑inventarier
* Stötta i enklare administrativa IT‑relaterade ärenden


**Vem vi tror att du är**
 Vi tror att du har ett genuint intresse för IT och gärna viss erfarenhet av IT‑support, servicedesk eller liknande. Du gillar att hjälpa andra, tar ansvar för dina uppgifter och bidrar till ett gott samarbete. Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska är ett krav, då du har daglig kontakt med både användare och kollegor på båda språken. För rollen krävs även att du har en avslutad gymnasieutbildning.
   

  

 Rollen passar dig som är serviceinriktad, lösningsorienterad och arbetar strukturerat. Du trivs med att ha kontakt med användare. Studerar du systemvetenskap eller liknande och vill testa dina kunskaper i praktiken är detta ett utmärkt sommarjobb.
   

  

**Ansökan**
 Oavsett bakgrund, kön, ålder eller erfarenhet – hos oss är du välkommen!
   

  

 Vill du vara med och forma framtidens IT-landskap? Skicka in din ansökan redan idag!
   

  

 Har du frågor? Kontakta Sofia Karlsson på sofia.karlsson@onitio.com. Urvalet sker löpande, därför kan tjänsten komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdatum.
   

  

 Som en del av rekryteringsprocessen genomför vi bakgrundskontroller via Fortcheck.
   

  

 Läs mer om oss på vår hemsida eller följ oss på LinkedIn.

title: IT Consultant - Stockholm | BCG Platinion
description:
Who We Are
   

  

 Do you want to turn the challenges of digitalization into the solutions of the future? Join BCG Platinion in tackling the core IT issues of leading global companies. Deploy customized platforms, architectures, strategies, and organizations to leverage the digital potential of our customers and drive true innovation, with state-of-the-art tools such as cloud computing, AI, blockchain, microservices, and containerization. Add your individual strengths to our unique team, always there to support you. Together with Boston Consulting Group and our clients, we turn digital visions into reality.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

 For our Stockholm office, we are looking for IT Consultants who will collaborate with colleagues from BCG Platinion and/or the Boston Consulting Group on local and international client projects!
   

  

 What You'll Bring
   

  

**You can help us make a difference if you**
* have a degree in computer science, informatics, business with focus on IT, or a related field
* gathered approx. two years of relevant experience in IT consulting (part or full time)
* are no stranger to the buzzwords machine learning, cyber resilience, DevOps, agile, AI, and robotics
* enjoy tackling complex digital challenges and are enthusiastic about developing and sharing solutions
* feel comfortable in interdisciplinary teams and global contexts and are flexible and willing to travel
* are excellent at understanding and communicating complex topics in English


 Who You'll Work With
   

  

**Shape the world of tomorrow**
* Shape the digital future of globally leading companies in an individual client context with overarching technical solutions
* Develop groundbreaking projects by enabling your clients to effectively use agile methods and modern approaches in the context of strategic IT implementation
* Smooth the path for tailored, future-oriented customer journeys based on precise analyses of the individual situation and with current market developments and trends such as machine learning in mind
* Design and optimize unique IT architectures within the framework of enterprise solution requirements, modern custom software developments, and sustainable digital solutions, including cyber resilience


 Additional info
   

  

**How To Grow With Us**
 We guarantee constant development incentives in an open and rewarding work environment! Together with a dedicated team of talented colleagues, you get to work on new challenges every day. Individual training offers and a culture of open feedback will provide the framework needed to explore and perfect personal strengths. Our modern structures allow focusing on the essence of our work - with easy travel booking, an excellent back-office support and comprehensive Knowledge Center. With our regular office Fridays and legendary events, we nurture a strong and close team network beyond our case work.
   

  

*BCG Platinion is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, age, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity / expression, national origin, disability, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected under national, provincial, or local law, where applicable.*

 Boston Consulting Group is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, age, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity / expression, national origin, disability, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected under national, provincial, or local law, where applicable, and those with criminal histories will be considered in a manner consistent with applicable state and local laws.

title: Network Infrastructure Engineer
description:
**About Us:** 




 At
 **Dabster** 
 , we specialize in connecting top talent with leading global organizations across engineering, digital, and technology domains. We are currently seeking an experienced
 **Network Operations Engineer (Advanced L2)** 
 to join our client’s global enterprise network operations team based in
 **Stockholm, Sweden** 
 . Our mission is to be the foremost recruitment partner in securing exceptional talent for complex and mission-critical technology environments.
 



  





**Who Will You Work With:** 




 Our client is a global enterprise with a highly sophisticated and large-scale network infrastructure spanning multiple regions. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams including Network Engineering, Security, Infrastructure, and external vendors to ensure seamless network operations. The role operates within a global support model, working closely with distributed teams to maintain high availability, performance, and security standards.
 



  





**About the Role:** 




 We are looking for a highly skilled
 **Network Operations Engineer (Advanced L2)** 
 responsible for maintaining the stability, security, and performance of a global enterprise network. This role emphasizes operational excellence through proactive monitoring, incident management, and structured change execution.
 



 You will play a critical role in troubleshooting complex network issues, optimizing performance, and supporting large-scale infrastructure operations across WAN, LAN, WLAN, VPN, Internet, and Cloud environments.
 



  





 This is an
 **initial 6-month contract** 
 with potential extensions, along with the opportunity to transition into a
 **12-month fixed-term contract on the client’s payroll** 
 .
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 



* Monitor, support, and maintain global network infrastructure including WAN, LAN, WLAN, VPN (remote & site-to-site), Internet, and Cloud connectivity.
* Respond to incidents, outages, and performance issues with a focus on rapid resolution and minimal business impact.
* Conduct detailed
 **Root Cause Analysis (RCA)** 
 and implement long-term corrective actions.
* Execute network changes including configuration updates, patching, and software upgrades across routers, switches, firewalls, wireless controllers, and load balancers.
* Maintain accurate network documentation including topology diagrams and operational procedures.
* Analyze and optimize network performance using tools such as
 **SevOne, Grafana, SolarWinds, and NetMRI** 
 .
* Collaborate with service providers and vendors to resolve connectivity and SLA-related issues.
* Support new deployments, integrations, and network-related projects in coordination with engineering teams.
* Contribute to automation and continuous improvement of monitoring and operational processes.



  





**Required Experience & Skills:** 



* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field (or equivalent experience).
* Minimum
 **5+ years of experience** 
 in enterprise network operations or advanced network support roles.
* Professional certification such as
 **CCNP** 
 or equivalent.



  





**Technical Expertise:** 



* **Networking Fundamentals:** 
 TCP/IP, Subnetting, DHCP, DNS, RADIUS, TACACS+, IP SLA, SNMP
* **Routing & Switching:** 
 BGP, OSPF, EIGRP, VLANs, STP, HSRP, EtherChannel
* **Firewalls & VPN:** 
 Cisco ASA, Palo Alto, Juniper SRX, FortiGate, IPSec/SSL VPN
* **Wireless:** 
 Cisco WLC (9800/5520), Wi-Fi design and site surveys
* **Load Balancing:** 
 Citrix ADC (NetScaler)
* **Access Control:** 
 Cisco ISE (RADIUS/TACACS authentication)
* **Physical Networking:** 
 Transceivers, optics, fiber patching, and cabling standards



  





**Tools & Platforms:** 



* Operating Systems: Windows, Linux
* Collaboration Tools: Office 365, Google Workspace, Visio, Miro, Slack, Zoom
* Remote Tools: SecureCRT
* ITSM: ServiceNow (Incident, Problem, Change Management)
* Network Tools: tcpdump, Wireshark, iPerf, Nmap, SevOne, SolarWinds, Grafana, NetMRI



  





**Key Personal Attributes:** 



* Strong troubleshooting and analytical skills with attention to detail
* Excellent communication and coordination abilities across global teams
* Ability to manage multiple priorities in high-pressure environments
* Self-motivated with a proactive and continuous learning mindset
* Adaptable team player capable of working independently or collaboratively



  





**Nice to Have:** 



* Experience with cloud platforms: AWS, Azure, GCP, OCI
* Scripting and automation: Python, PowerShell, Ansible, REST APIs
* Familiarity with network automation frameworks: Ansible, Nornir, Netmiko
* Understanding of API integrations and data pipelines
* Experience with structured data formats: XML, JSON, YAML
* Exposure to CI/CD tools such as Jenkins, GitLab, Puppet, Chef



  





**What We Offer:** 



* **Contract Duration:** 
 Initial 6 months with potential extensions
* **Employment Option:** 
 Opportunity for 12-month fixed-term contract on client payroll
* **Location:** 
 Stockholm, Sweden
* **Work Environment:** 
 Enterprise-scale global network operations
* **Opportunity:** 
 Work with cutting-edge networking technologies and global teams



  





**Interview Process:** 




 The selection process typically includes one or two technical interview rounds focusing on networking fundamentals, troubleshooting scenarios, and operational experience, followed by a final discussion with the hiring team.
 



  





**Mandatory Skills:** 



* Cisco SDN Network Administration

title: IT, administration och teknik - Spontanansökan till vårt kontor i Bromma!
description:
Onitio är en nordisk IT-koncern, ägd av det norska investmentbolaget Aars, med cirka 1500 anställda, varav 500 i Sverige. Vi erbjuder innovativa IT-lösningar genom tre affärsområden:
   

  

* Onitio Technology Services – Vi ser till att IT- och teknisk utrustning fungerar genom installation, support och underhåll.
* Onitio Workforce Services & Consulting – Vi erbjuder flexibla IT-resurser och bemanningslösningar för att stärka våra kunders verksamhet.
* Onitio Solutions – Vi driver digital transformation och utvecklar innovativa IT-lösningar.


 Med kontor från Malmö i söder till Luleå i norr kombinerar vi teknisk expertis med innovation och kundfokus. Vi arbetar aktivt för en hållbar framtid – exempelvis genom att 98 % av vår fordonsflotta består av elbilar.
   

  

 Hos oss blir du en del av ett dynamiskt och framgångsrikt team där vi värdesätter mångfald och inkludering. Vi anser att olika perspektiv skapar bättre lösningar och vi arbetar aktivt för att fler kvinnor ska trivas och utvecklas i IT-branschen!
   

  

**Om rollerna**
 Vi rekryterar just nu flertalet olika roller, från administratör till IT-tekniker. Tycker du att det låter intressant är du varmt välkommen att skicka in en ansökan, rätt inställning till att lära sig är det viktigaste, resten lär du dig på plats hos oss!
   

  

**Varför Onitio?**
 På Onitio är medarbetarna vår viktigaste tillgång. Vi erbjuder trygga anställningar, är kollektivavtalsanslutna via TechSverige (IT-avtalet) med tillhörande förmåner, och utöver detta erbjuds alla medarbetare friskvårdsbidrag (för närvarande om 4000 kr/kalenderår), rabattavtal hos ledande friskvårdsleverantörer och andra lokala förmåner.
   

  

 Kompetensutveckling är en självklar del av vår kultur. Genom utbildningar, certifieringar och karriärmöjligheter får du de verktyg du behöver för att växa – oavsett om du vill fördjupa din expertis eller bredda dina kunskaper. Vi sätter tillsammans individuella och meningsfulla mål för dig, och arbetar med din kompetensutveckling löpande under året där din närmaste chef finns till för att stötta dig.
   

  

**Vem vi söker**
 Våra värderingar visar egenskaper som vi på Onitio värdesätter:
   

  

* Brinner för kundnöjdhet och är lösningsorienterad då andra ser problem.
* Är pålitlig och ansvarstagande i att leverera det du lovar.
* Gillar att samarbeta och uppskattar en företagskultur där vi stöttar varandra och firar framgångar tillsammans.


 Vi söker en mångfald av kompetenser och bakgrunder. Har du erfarenhet inom IT är det en bonus, men vi värdesätter framför allt din vilja att lära och utvecklas tillsammans med oss!
   

  

 Krav är att du är flytande i svenska och engelska, i tal och skrift.
   

  

**Ansökan**
 Oavsett bakgrund, kön, ålder eller erfarenhet – hos oss är du välkommen!
   

  

 Vill du vara med och forma framtidens IT-landskap? Skicka in din ansökan redan idag!
   

  

 Har du frågor? Kontakta Lina Ambjörnsson på eller lina.ambjornsson@onitio.com. Urvalet sker löpande, därför kan tjänsten komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdatum.
   

  

 Läs mer om oss på vår hemsida eller följ oss på LinkedIn.

title: Lead Engineer - IT Workplace (M365)
description:
We are looking for an experienced Lead Engineer – IT Workplace (Microsoft 365) to join our IT Operations team and play a key role in shaping the future of our modern digital workplace.
   

  

 At NOBA, you will step into a key role where you help shape and evolve a modern digital workplace that has real impact on how the organization works every day. You will join a collaborative and skilled IT Operations team, where you get the opportunity to work with cutting-edge Microsoft technologies in a dynamic environment that values both ownership and continuous improvement.
   

  

 In this role, you will take ownership of our Microsoft 365 environment, supporting around 1,000 users on a secure, scalable, and user-friendly Windows 11 platform. You will combine hands-on technical expertise with strategic responsibility to ensure a modern, efficient, and secure workplace experience.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As our Lead Engineer, you will be responsible for the development, governance, and continuous improvement of our digital IT workplace. You will work closely with both technical teams and business stakeholders, acting as a bridge between technology and user needs.
   

  

 This is a key role in driving our workplace transformation, ensuring high standards in security, compliance, and user experience.
   

  

 You will be part of our IT Operations team of 17 colleagues based in Oslo and Stockholm, working with cloud solutions, infrastructure, workplace services, and IT support.
   

  

**Main Tasks**
* Own and develop the Microsoft 365 platform, including roadmap and governance
* Design and implement modern IT workplace solutions aligned with business and IT strategy
* Ensure security, compliance, and best practices across the M365 environment
* Drive adoption of tools and services across the organization
* Maintain operational excellence, including documentation, support, and platform stability
* Manage device lifecycle, Windows 11 environments, and endpoint management
* Coordinate with vendors and external partners


**We Are Looking For You Who Have**
* Solid experience with Microsoft 365, including Entra ID and Intune
* Strong knowledge of cloud services, endpoint management, and security (e.g., Conditional Access, Defender, data protection)
* At least 3-5 years of experience in a technical role within IT Workplace
* Experience managing Windows 11 environments and modern workplace platforms
* Proficiency in PowerShell automation
* Experience leading cloud transformation or workplace modernization initiatives
* Fluent in English


**It's Positive If You**
* Experience working in a regulated organization
* Relevant certifications like: Microsoft365, Entra and Office365
* Fluent in Swedish and/or the Norwegian language


**To thrive and perform well in the role, we believe that you are:**
 A technically strong and proactive person who enjoys combining hands-on work with strategic thinking. You are comfortable collaborating across teams and communicating effectively with both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
   

  

 In addition to this, it is important to us that you recognize yourself in our values: we are wholehearted, we collaborate and we take the lead.
   

  

**Have you heard of NOBAVERSE?**
 In our NOBAVERSE, we value openness, trust, and diversity. Here, you can influence your own development and have fun along the way to achieving our goals – all in a workplace that’s a little extra
 *bubbly* 
 ! ✨
   

  

 Read more about our employee value proposition on our careers page.
   

  

**Read more about how our recruitment process works in the** 
**FAQ** 
**.**
 We care for your privacy and, with reference to the GDPR, would like to ask you not to include any sensitive personal data in your application, for examples information about ethnic origin, political opinions, religious beliefs or information about your health.
   

  

**Read more about how we handle your personal data** 
**here** 
**.**
 If you have any questions or concerns about the position, please contact the responsible recruiter.
   

  

 We look forward to receiving your application! 🙏✨

title: Brand Designer
description:
**TL;DR** 
 - We're looking for a world-class brand designer to help define and evolve Lovable's visual identity. You'll contribute to our brand across all touchpoints, creating assets for web, print, and motion. We expect exceptional taste, versatility across mediums, and the ability to maintain consistency in a fast-paced environment. You'll join a team at the forefront of AI, enabling anyone to create software.
   

  

**Why Lovable?**
 Lovable lets anyone and everyone build software with plain English. From solopreneurs to Fortune 100 teams, millions of people use Lovable to transform raw ideas into real products - fast. We are at the forefront of a foundational shift in software creation, which means you have an unprecedented opportunity to change the way the world works. Over 2 million people in 200+ countries already use Lovable to launch businesses, automate work, and bring their ideas to life. And we're just getting started.
   

  

 We're a small, talent-dense team building a generation-defining company from Stockholm. We value extreme ownership, high velocity and low-ego collaboration. We seek out people who care deeply, move fast, and are eager to make a dent in the world.
   

  

**What We're Looking For**
* Experience designing for web, print, and motion across high-growth startup environments
* A portfolio of shipped brand assets - campaign visuals, social graphics, presentation decks, event materials, and marketing collateral
* Strong craft across brand identity, typography, layout, and illustration with demonstrable output
* Proven ability to maintain brand consistency while delivering high volumes of work across multiple channels
* Experience creating scalable brand systems, templates, and guidelines that enable teams to execute independently
* Ability to work autonomously and manage multiple concurrent projects from brief to delivery


**What You'll Do**
 In one sentence: Shape how the world sees and experiences Lovable.
   

  

* Own and evolve Lovable's visual identity system across all brand touchpoints
* Create marketing assets for campaigns, social media, events, and partnerships
* Design presentation decks, one-pagers, and sales materials that tell our story compellingly
* Establish brand guidelines and systems that ensure consistency as we scale rapidly
* Build tools, templates, and processes that empower the team to create on-brand work independently
* Collaborate with product design to ensure brand consistency within the product experience
* Work with content and growth teams to bring campaigns to life visually
* Be scrappy and hands-on with whatever the brand needs - from a LinkedIn carousel to event signage
* Help set the bar for creative quality and taste at Lovable


**How We Hire**
* Fill in a short form then jump on an initial exploratory call.
* We'll send you a quick take-home asking to present your best work over a loom video presentation.
* Join us for a round of interviews to discuss your experience in more depth
* Join us for trial work lasting 1-2 days remote or on-site. We'll see how you tick and you get to meet the team and explore whether joining Lovable feels right for you.


**Important Note:**
* Please submit your application in English. It's our company language so you'll be speaking lots of it if you join.
* We treat all candidates equally - if you're interested please apply through our careers portal.

title: Strategy Development Manager
description:
**Job Description**

 As part of our journey to transform ourselves and elevate H&M through our company strategy, we have recently established the Strategy, Innovation, and Business Development function. The purpose of the function is to accelerate our company strategy ambitions and collaborate across business functions, to simplify and create clarity for teams working towards our common direction, while ensuring effective steering and governance of strategic priorities to deliver on long-term strategy.
   

  





 Strategy Team focuses on securing a clear common long-term direction and strategic plan ensuring clarity and alignment across the organization on what to deliver on.
   

  





**WHAT YOU’LL DO**




 As Strategy Development Manager, you play a key role in shaping the strategic direction at group level. You work closely with management and key stakeholders across H&M Group, driving cross-functional strategic initiatives and ensuring effective strategic steering.
   

  





**Key responsibilities include:**



* Develop the company’s long term strategy and actionable strategic initiatives, in collaboration with business functions
* Drive cross-functional strategic initiatives, collaborating with key business functions
* Securing alignment between overall strategy and totality of functions’ strategic initiatives
* Lead and support steering and governance processes to ensure strategic priorities are executed effectively and progress is tracked
* Work closely together with management and key strategy stakeholders across H&M Group, ensuring prioritization in line with strategic direction
* Develop a deep understanding of our business and be the person that can guide and empower the leaders in setting the right focus to ensure long-term objectives are met



**WHO YOU ARE**
  

  

  

 We are looking for a person who combines strategic thinking with strong analytical skills and clear, convincing communication. You quickly identify the essence of complex challenges and translate them into actionable solutions. You bring a proactive mindset and are confident in driving initiatives forward, committed to delivering high-quality outcomes.
   

  





 Working closely with stakeholders at different levels, you understand their perspectives and priorities and adapt your approach to create alignment and clarity. You are comfortable influencing and challenging senior stakeholders when needed, guiding decision-making while maintaining focus on long-term objectives.
   

  





 You thrive in a dynamic and evolving environment, are open and flexible, and enjoy shaping the future together with others.
   

  





**To succeed in this role, you also have:**



* 5+ years of experience, ideally gained at a top-tier strategy consulting firm, with a strong track record of delivering in fast-paced, high-stakes environments
* Proven track record of company/group-level strategy development work, as a strategy consultant and/or in a similar role
* Strong ability to interpret data and insights, and translate into strategic actions
* Strong business acumen and analytical rigor
* Strong problem-solving ability in a complex business context



**WHO WE ARE**




 H&M Group is a global company of strong fashion brands and ventures. Our goal is to prove that there is no compromise between exceptional design, affordable prices, and sustainable solutions. We want to liberate fashion for the many, and our customers are at the heart of every decision we make.
   

  





 We are made up of thousands of passionate and talented colleagues united by our shared culture and values. Together, we want to use our power, our scale, and our knowledge to push the fashion industry towards a more inclusive and sustainable future. Read more about us here.
   

  

  

  

**JOIN US** 





 Our uniqueness comes from a combination of many things – our inclusive and collaborative culture, our strong values, and opportunities for growth. But most of all, it’s our people who make us who we are.
   

  





 Take the next step in your career together with us. The journey starts here.
   

  





 This is a
 **permanent position** 
 based in Stockholm and you report to Head of Strategy.
   

  

  

  

 Please send your CV in English as soon as possible.
 *(For internal candidates, please initiate a dialogue with you manager before applying).* 
  

  





*\*We are committed to a recruitment process that is fair, equitable, and based on competency. We therefore kindly ask you to not attach a cover letter in your application.*

title: AI & IT Operations Engineer (Interim)
description:
We are super excited to announce that Olivia, Manjunath, Stefan and Magnus are looking to welcome their next colleague to Voyados Information Technology team.
   

  

 You’ll sit at the intersection of infrastructure, business impact and AI, helping us evolve how we run, scale and rethink our internal systems – while also shaping how AI is adopted and used across the organisation.
   

  

 This is an
 **interim role starting in August, for approximately 6 months** 
 , and we are also open to
 **consultant setups** 
 .
   

  

 Some of the things you'll be up to:
   

  

 You’ll play a key role in helping us take the next step in our AI journey – from exploration to real impact across the business.
   

  

 We are still early in this journey, which means you won’t just work with defined use cases – you’ll help find, shape and drive them.
   

  

* Review our current IT landscape, identifying opportunities to optimize, replace or build smarter internal solutions with clear ROI.
* Work closely with teams across the organisation to understand needs and translate them into technical solutions. Especially in areas like: internal tooling, support automation and revenue enablement (data enrichment, sales workflows and insights)
* Bridge between business and tech, work closely with teams to understand needs and translate them into streamlined AI supported workflows
* Improve and automate IT operations and infrastructure (e.g. onboarding, access management, Entra ID) while enabling teams to become more AI driven through guidance and knowledge sharing.


 So, who are you?
   

  

 You’re someone with a technical background who thrives in an environment where things are still taking shape. You’re curious about AI, optimistic about its potential, and motivated by turning ideas into real, usable solutions. We also see that you're proactive, hands on and comfortable working in an evolving environment. you take initiatives, identify and drive things forward.
   

  

 We also believe you:
   

  

* Are a business oriented engineer who undersands how technology (especially AI and infrastructure) creates real impact and value across organisation
* Have solid background in cloud/infrastructure with a good understanding of the IT landscape
* Have been involved in AI related initiatives or projects


 What's in it for you?
   

  

 Voyado wouldn’t be the powerful platform it is without the people behind it. We really care for our Voyadoers and some examples of what we can offer you are:
   

  

* An engaged team with a knowledge-sharing and friendly culture
* Summits where we hang out, workshop, discuss, and have a good time together
* Opportunities for personal and professional growth and learning in a dynamic and supportive environment.
* Work-life balance – we don't have a long work-hours culture, we value engagement over hours worked.
* An office-first but flexible hybrid working policy.


 Some of our benefits:
   

  

* 30 days of vacation, so you can spend time on the things you love
* Beneficial bike lease, including e-bikes
* Breakfast buffet on Fridays
* Inhouse gym only for Voyadoers
* A generous gadget-and-phone package (your choice!)
* 5000 SEK per year in wellness allowance
* Parental leave top-up additional support for new parents
* A wellness hour you can use every week


**About Voyado**
