* god kunskap om lagstiftning avseende blodverksamhet och vävnadsinrättning
* erfarenhet av arbete inom tillståndspliktiga verksamheter för hälso-, och sjukvården
* erfarenhet av tillståndsprövning


**Detta kan IVO erbjuda dig**
 Vi erbjuder en utvecklande roll i en dynamisk kunskapsorganisation där du bidrar till att utveckla en modern och effektiv tillsyn. Vi förbättrar ständigt våra arbetssätt och strävar efter en sammansättning av medarbetare som speglar samhällets mångfald.
   

  

 Läs om våra avtalsvillkor och förmåner här: Arbeta hos oss | IVO.se
   

  

 Ansökan
   

  

 Du ansöker genom att svara på våra urvalsfrågor och bifoga ditt CV. I din ansökan ska det framgå hur du motsvarar kravprofilen. Frågorna utgår från kravprofilen för den här rekryteringen och dina svar ligger till grund för det urval som sker i processen. Din ansökan anses komplett först när du besvarat frågorna.
   

  

**Ansök senast den 28 april**
 Läs mer om vår rekryteringsprocess här: Arbeta hos oss | IVO.se
   

  

 Arbetsplatsbeskrivning
   

  

 Avdelningen för tillståndsprövning ansvarar för att pröva tillstånd för verksamheter inom vissa delar av hälso- och sjukvården samt socialtjänstlagen (SoL), lagen om stöd och service till vissa funktionshindrade (LSS)
   

  

 IVO bidrar till en trygg och säker vård och omsorg
   

  

 IVO står för engagemang och bred kunskap om svensk vård och omsorg. Vi granskar, drar lärdomar och arbetar för att vården och omsorgen ska bli bättre och säkrare – alltid med fokus på patienter och brukare.
   

  

 Myndigheten har cirka 800 medarbetare. Tillsyn bedrivs vid sex regionala avdelningar runt om i landet, medan tillståndsprövning, analys, planering, kommunikation samt verksamhetsstöd finns i Stockholm, liksom generaldirektörens stab.

title: Affinity & Partnership Underwriter (Sweden)
description:
**Are you motivated by a role where your analytical skills and commercial mindset go hand in hand?**
 We are looking for an
 **Affinity & Partnership Underwriter** 
 to join our Nordic Accident & Health (A&H) team in Stockholm. In the Nordics, we have a unique way of driving business through partnerships – a model so specialized it distinguishes us from other AIG offices globally. In this role, you bridge the gap between technical underwriting and commercial execution.
   

  

 For the right candidate, this role is the perfect mix of technical mastery of our
 **Affinity products and Account Management** 
 . Working with Affinity means building the bridge between AIG and our partners' customers (B2B2C). You will work in a close-knit duo with our Partnership Development Manager – they identify and open the doors to new partnerships, while you act as the technical and commercial anchor. You ensure that our partnership programs are profitable, operationally sound and deliver a strong value proposition to our clients and the end-consumer.
   

  

**What’s in it for you?**
 At AIG, we offer a "Learn-It-All" culture that values expertise and freedom with responsibility. This role offers a rare opportunity to become a specialist in a unique business model within a global organization.
   

  

  

* Account Ownership: You take full responsibility for your own partner accounts, acting as the commercial face of our programs and driving long-term account management.
* Strategic Influence: You drive the development of our products and value proposition, ensuring AIG remains the preferred partner in the market.
* Nordic Integration: You are part of a fully integrated Nordic unit of 30 A&H professionals, giving you access to deep technical expertise across the region.
* Swedish Benefits: 30 days of annual vacation, occupational pension, private health insurance and a wellness allowance.


**Your Impact And Responsibilities**
* Account Management: You are the primary point of contact for our partners, hosting status and renewal meetings and ensuring high service levels.
* Partnership Collaboration: You partner with the Partnership Development Manager to secure the technical foundation for new and existing programs.
* Value Proposition: You prepare and present professional tenders and product solutions, translating complex data into commercial advantages for our partners.
* Portfolio Analysis: You conduct regular reviews of portfolio performance and use your insights to suggest product or pricing adjustments.
* Continuous Improvement: You develop and maintain best practices for our partnership underwriting to ensure efficiency and quality.


**What You'll Need To Succeed**
* Experience in Account Management and data handling. While experience from insurance or the broader financial sector is a plus, it is not a requirement.
* You see yourself as being proactive, curious and taking pride in delivering quality work.
* Readiness for a commercial and autonomous challenge, where you step up to take full ownership of your portfolio and stakeholder relationships.
* An analytical mindset, being comfortable translating data into actionable business decisions.
* Fluency in Swedish and English (written and spoken).


**Meet the team**
 You will be based in our central Stockholm office and report to our Nordic Underwriting Manager for A&H based in Denmark. You will also work closely with the remaining A&H leadership team and the rest of the Nordic A&H unit in all four Nordic countries (Denmark, Finland, Norway and Sweden). We value professional integrity, a direct tone and a collaborative spirit.
   

  

**How To Apply**
 No need for a lengthy cover letter. Send us your CV and a short section on your motivation for joining our unique Affinity journey in the Nordics. We review applications on an ongoing basis.
   

  

**For Inquiries, Contact**
* Cecilie Mogensen – Underwriting Manager A&H, Nordics | cecilie.mogensen@aig.com
* Tobias H. Larsen – HR Business Partner & TA Manager, Nordics | tobias.larsen@aig.com


 At AIG, we value in-person collaboration as a vital part of our culture, which is why we ask our team members to be primarily in the office. This approach helps us work together effectively and create a supportive, connected environment for our team and clients alike.
   

  

**Enjoy Benefits That Take Care Of What Matters**
 At AIG, our people are our greatest asset. We know how important it is to protect and invest in what’s most important to you. That is why we created our Total Rewards Program, a comprehensive benefits package that extends beyond time spent at work to offer benefits focused on your health, wellbeing and financial security—as well as your professional development—to bring peace of mind to you and your family.
   

  

**Reimagining insurance to make a bigger difference to the world**
 American International Group, Inc. (AIG) is a global leader in commercial and personal insurance solutions; we are one of the world’s most far-reaching property casualty networks. It is an exciting time to join us — across our operations, we are thinking in new and innovative ways to deliver ever-better solutions to our customers. At AIG, you can go further to support individuals, businesses, and communities, helping them to manage risk, respond to times of uncertainty and discover new potential. We invest in our largest asset, our people, through continuous learning and development, in a culture that celebrates everyone for who they are and what they want to become.
   

  

**Welcome to a culture of inclusion**
 We’re committed to creating a culture that truly respects and celebrates each other’s talents, backgrounds, cultures, opinions and goals. We foster a culture of inclusion and belonging through learning, cultural awareness activities and Employee Resource Groups (ERGs). With global chapters, ERGs are a cornerstone for our culture of inclusion. The talent of our people is one of AIG’s greatest assets, and we are honored that our drive for positive change has been recognized by numerous recent awards and accreditations.
   

  

*AIG provides equal opportunity to all qualified individuals regardless of race, color, religion, age, gender, gender expression, national origin, veteran status, disability or any other legally protected categories.*
 AIG is committed to working with and providing reasonable accommodations to job applicants and employees with disabilities. If you believe you need a reasonable accommodation, please send an email to candidatecare@aig.com.
   

  

**Functional Area**
 UW - Underwriting
   

  

 AIG Europe S.A Filial i Sverige

title: Senior Consultants within performance improvement - for our team in Stockholm
description:
**Company Description**
 We believe in the power of ingenuity to build a positive human future.
   

  

 As strategies, technologies, and innovation collide, we create opportunity from complexity.
   

  

 Our teams of interdisciplinary experts combine innovative thinking and breakthrough technologies to progress further, faster. Our clients adapt and transform, and together we achieve enduring results.
   

  

 We are over 4,000 strategists, innovators, designers, consultants, digital experts, scientists, engineers, and technologists. And we have deep expertise in consumer and manufacturing, defence and security, energy and utilities, financial services, government and public services, health and life sciences, and transport.
   

  

**Our teams operate globally from offices across the UK, Ireland, US, Nordics, and Netherlands.**
**Job Description**
*Do you like helping companies unlock performance improvement opportunities and deliver profitable growth? Would you enjoy working alongside like-*
*minded peers who support each other as a team in a consultancy with a flat hierarchy? If so, you may be the perfect fit for our team. We are now looking for ambitious and* 
*experienced* 
*consultants to strengthen our Operations & Improvement team in Stockholm.*
 Our Operations and Improvement team works with clients across all major sectors. The team works on strategy through to implementation on issues critical to the growth and prosperity of business operations across the world. PA is home to a wide range of capabilities including our Global Engineering and Technology Centres, a strong Digital Strategy team as well as skilled People & Change leaders that allows us to drive performance improvement initiatives for our clients that can uncover opportunities beyond process improvement. Our typical client projects include:
   

  

  

* Enterprise wide cost reduction programs, including design-to-value innovation, cash flow management and sourcing optimsation
* Supply chain network and logistics optimization
* Manufacturing capacity improvement and scaling as well as manufacturing innovation
* Designing and delivering the supply chains and manufacturing capabilities of tomorrow including supply chain digitalization
* Agile transformations


**What You’ll Do**
 Within this role, you will lead the delivery of strategic and complex consulting engagements, including managing teams and senior clients. As a senior consultant, you like to play a key part in business development, sales initiatives and Thought Leadership, with the aim of further expanding competencies and propositions that help to acquire new assignments and clients, and to expand our existing clients and of course, the growth of your own career at PA.
   

  

  

* Drive performance improvement initiatives from strategy through execution
* Analyse performance, identify improvement opportunities and design solutions
* Manage project, drive PMOs and lead change
* Help clients realize business benefits through improved ways of working, digitalization and governance


 We believe value is created through close collaboration with our clients. You will join an international environment that prioritizes teamwork, sparring and continuous learning so we can deliver outstanding work. We are therefore looking for someone with an open and curious approach to solving challenges and who is driven by acquiring new knowledge. Your employment with us starts with a thorough introduction. To support your development, you will from day one be assigned a manager and a buddy who, together with you, will prepare a development plan adapted to your skills and interests.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 We are looking for candidates who are curious, ambitious, and hungry to learn. As you should expect to be managing projects with responsibility for leading other consultants, we are searching for someone with a minimum of 3 years’ management consulting experience or similar.
   

  

 Ideally you will have:
   

  

  

* 5 to 10 years of experience within the area of performance improvement, agile operations, operational excellence or supply chain management.
* Experience from consulting within the sectors of manufacturing, transport and/or defense.
* Demonstrated leadership in large, diverse project teams and the ability to work effectively across all organisational levels, delivering creative and impactful solutions.
* Energetic, positive team player committed to excellence and driven by achieving strong results together.


**Join us if you want to:**
* Work alongside experts in performance improvement, and change management advising decision-makers at global companies
* Take on complex business challenges and gain responsibility early, accelerating your career growth
* Collaborate with colleagues across the Nordics, Europe, and the US in a truly international environment


**Ready to make an impact and grow fast? Apply today.**
**Additional Information**
 If it sounds like a challenge tailormade for you, then apply already today. We will be interviewing continuously, as we want the best candidates for the team.
   

  

 If you have any questions, please contact Sanna Austrell at sanna.austrell@paconsulting.com
   

  

**Inclusion & Diversity**
 We believe that diversity makes us a stronger firm and look to employ people with different ideas, styles and skillsets. This diversity stimulates a rich, creative environment – one in which our people develop, and our clients enjoy enduring results. We’re committed to recruiting, promoting and rewarding our people solely based on their ability to contribute to PA’s goals, without regard to their sex, race, disability, religion, national origin, ethnicity, sexual orientation, age or marital status.
   

  

*We welcome international applications, but we are unable to offer sponsorship for work permits, so you will need to have the full right to live and work in Sweden.*
 As part of our recruitment process we use Sterling ADP to carry out background screening checks towards the end of the recruitment process.

title: Vikarierande administrativ förvaltare
description:
**Om arbetsplatsen**
 Sigtuna kommun är en plats med stor spännvidd. Här ryms levande landsbygd, småstad och en internationell flygplats. Ett rikt kulturarv och kulturell mångfald. En stolt historia och stora framtidsplaner. Kanske är det därför drivkraften är så stark att växa, förändras och utvecklas. Det är också därför det är så spännande att arbeta här. Hos oss blir du del av en prestigelös och nytänkande kultur där vi hjälps åt och tar tillvara på varandras kunskap, olikheter och erfarenheter. Arbetet är ofta omväxlande, ibland utmanande men alltid meningsfullt. Välkommen hit!
   

  

 På samhällsbyggnadskontoret arbetar cirka 200 personer med uppgiften att göra Sigtuna kommun till en attraktiv, levande och trygg plats att bo och verka i. Vi planerar nya bostads- och verksamhetsområden. Vi projekterar och bygger gator och ledningar för vatten och avlopp. Vi tar hand om parker och skogar samt skolgårdar, förskolegårdar och lekplatser. Vi arbetar med trafikfrågor, parkeringsövervakning, renhållning och mycket mer. Vi har hand om myndighetsutövningen och utövar tillsyn och kontroll samt utfärdar tillstånd inom våra områden. Vi satsar på våra medarbetare genom såväl goda resurser för kompetensutveckling som gemensamma aktiviteter.
   

  

 Fastighetsavdelningen är mitt uppe i en förändringsresa. Genom portföljstyrning och internhyresmodell har arbetssätten förändrats i grunden. Fastighetsavdelningen består av två enheter: Förvaltningsenhet kvartersmark och Förvaltningsenhet allmän plats.
   

  

 Avdelningens uppdrag är att företräda kommunstyrelsen i rollen som fastighetsägare genom en effektiv och professionell beställar- och förvaltarfunktion för kommunens lokalförsörjning och markförvaltning.
   

  

**Arbetsuppgifter**
* I våra fastighetssystem administrativa avtal, felanmälningar och hyresavisering.
* Hantera registratur, tjänsteskrivelser, internfakturering, framtagande av viss ekonomisk information.
* Hantera årshjul och arbetsplaner för våra enheter.
* Arbeta tillsammans med och stödja förvaltare och projektledare.
* Administration vid nyanställning och avslut.
* Minnesanteckningar vid möten.
* Övriga administrativa uppgifter


**Kvalifikationer**
 Vi söker dig som har:
   

  

* Eftergymnasial utbildning inom ekonomi/administration eller annan utbildning/erfarenhet som bedöms som likvärdig.
* Erfarenhet av liknande administrativa tjänster.
* Arbetat i en politisk styrd organisation är meriterande.
* Kunskaper i fastighetssystem är meriterande.
* Du uttrycker dig väl i både tal och skrift, och har lätt att kommunicera och samarbeta med olika intressenter.
* Du har B-körkort och goda IT- kunskaper i Microsoft 365.


 Som administrativ förvaltare har du ett tydligt målfokus och drivs av att skapa värde för både verksamhet och kunder. Du agerar med affärsmässighet, har ett analytiskt öga för helhet och detaljer, och tar gärna initiativ för att lösa utmaningar på ett långsiktigt sätt. Du samarbetar smidigt med både kollegor och externa parter alltid med en lösningsfokuserad och prestigelös inställning.
   

  

**Övrig information**
 Din ansökan gör du enkelt genom att bifoga ditt CV och svara på några urvalsfrågor kopplade till denna tjänst. Vi ber dig dock att inte bifoga personligt brev.
   

  

 Som anställd i Sigtuna kommun får du ta del av en rad förmåner, bl.a. blir du automatiskt medlem i Personalklubben där du kan delta i olika aktiviteter. Läs gärna mer om våra andra förmåner och hur det är att jobba hos oss i Sigtuna kommun!
   

  

 https://www.sigtuna.se/naringsliv-och-arbete/jobba-hos-oss.html
   

  

 Vi undanber oss erbjudanden om annonserings- och rekryteringshjälp.
   

  

**LIP**

title: Administrator Customer Support till HAVI Tumba
description:
Administrator Customer Support
 



**Full/Part-time:** 
 Full time
 



**Job Category:** 
 Administration
 



**City:** 
 Tumba
 



    
 



**Location** 
 : Tumba, Sverige
 



**Workplace:** 
  På plats
 



  
 



 Bli vår nya
 



**Customer Support-medarbetare** 




  





 På HAVI tror vi på att rekrytera människor – inte bara CV:n. Om du trivs i en roll där teknik, flöden och kundrelationer möts, och där din systemförståelse gör verklig skillnad i vardagen, kan detta vara rätt nästa steg för dig.
 



 Vi söker nu en Customer Support-medarbetare till vårt team i Tumba. Det här är en bred och kvalificerad roll där du arbetar nära både kund, lager, transport och IT för att säkerställa stabila och effektiva leveransflöden till några av världens största restaurangkedjor.
 



  
 



**Om rollen** 




 Som Customer Support hos HAVI är du en central del i vårt dagliga flöde, från order till leverans. Arbetet innebär daglig kontakt med kunder via telefon och mejl, parallellt med ett omfattande system- och flödesarbete. Du verkar även i en internationell miljö, där du hanterar kundorder och samarbetar över landsgränser, bland annat med våra grannländer och Tyskland. Arbetet är långt ifrån traditionell kundservice. Vår verksamhet präglas av en hög automatiseringsgrad, vilket innebär att du i stor utsträckning arbetar systemnära och ansvarar för att identifiera, analysera och driva lösning när något i flödet inte fungerar som det ska.
 



  





 Du arbetar proaktivt med avvikelser, felsökning och uppföljning, och är ofta den som upptäcker när system, integrationer eller processer riskerar att påverka leverensen till kund. I dessa lägen driver du ärendet vidare, samordnar internt och samarbetar tätt med IT tills lösningen är på plats och systemen är fullt fungerande igen.
 



  





 Du blir en del av ett sammansvetsat team med hög kompetens och stort engagemang, där man stöttar varandra och tar gemensamt ansvar för helheten.
 








**Dina ansvarsområden:** 



* Säkerställa ett stabilt och professionellt kundflöde i det dagliga arbetet
* Ta emot, registrera och följa upp kundorder i våra system
* Arbeta systemnära i en automatiserad miljö och säkerställa att flöden fungerar korrekt
* Identifiera avvikelser i system och processer samt driva dessa till lösning
* Driva och följa upp incidenter och störningar med IT tills systemen är tillbaka i full drift
* Utreda och följa upp reklamationsärenden i samarbete med kund och interna funktioner
* Besvara kundfrågor kopplat till orderstatus, leveranser och sortiment
* Hantera nyöppningar av kunder och säkerställa korrekt och kvalitetssäkrad uppstart
* Arbeta i system och verktyg, såsom kundportaler, CRM, Power BI och verksamhetssystem
* Samverka tätt med lager, transport, leverantörer och kollegor internt
* Bidra aktivt till förbättring av arbetssätt, rutiner och processer inom teamet



  
 



**Vi tror att du:** 



* Har mycket god systemförståelse och trivs i en tekniskt orienterad roll
* Har förmåga att se helheten och upptäcka när något i flödet inte fungerar
* Är strukturerad, analytisk och lösningsorienterad
* Trivs med ansvar och driver frågor hela vägen till lösning
* Har ett serviceinriktat arbetssätt och god kommunikativ förmåga
* Är en lagspelare som bidrar till både resultat och teamkultur
* Talar och skriver svenska och engelska obehindrat



 Meriterande är erfarenhet från kundnära roller i komplexa flöden, serviceverksamhet eller restaurangbranschen samt god vana av Office-paketet, framför allt Excel.
 



  
 



*“Här jobbar vi nära varandra och nära våra kunder. När något inte fungerar hjälps vi åt, tar ansvar och ser till att hitta lösningar tillsammans för våra kunder.”* 




*—* 
  
 *Henrik Wahlholm, Customer Support Manager* 









**Därför kommer du trivas hos oss:** 



* En kvalificerad roll med stort eget ansvar i en verksamhet med högt tempo
* Möjlighet att arbeta nära både affär, teknik och logistik
* Ett engagerat team med stark sammanhållning
* En organisation där förbättringsförslag och initiativ uppmuntras
* Kollektivavtal och trygga anställningsvillkor



  
 



 Vi går igenom ansökningar löpande, så vänta inte för länge om detta låter spännande. Vänligen skicka in din ansökan inkluderat CV och personligt brev. Vi tar inte emot ansökningar via e-post.
 



 Om du har några frågor om tjänsten är du välkommen att kontakta rekryterande chef Henrik Wahlholm på henrik.wahlholm@havi.com.
 



  
 



**Om HAVI** 




*HAVI är ett globalt, privatägt företag som fokuserar på att utveckla, optimera och hantera leveranskedjor åt ledande varumärken. I Sverige har HAVI cirka 220 medarbetare och vår verksamhet omfattar både logistik och huvudkontor i Tumba. Vi arbetar med välkända kunder som McDonald’s, Espresso House, Pizza Hut, Taco Bell och Subway och levererar pålitliga, effektiva och hållbara lösningar inom supply chain. På HAVI kombinerar vi globala styrkor med en stark lokal närvaro – och vi glömmer aldrig att det är våra medarbetare som är nyckeln till allt vi gör.*

title: Sr. Account Executive - Agentforce - SWE
description:
*To get the best candidate experience, please consider applying for a maximum of 3 roles within 12 months to ensure you are not duplicating efforts.*
 Job Category
   

  

 Sales
   

  

 Job Details
   

  

******About Salesforce******
 Salesforce is the #1 AI CRM, where humans with agents drive customer success together. Here, ambition meets action. Tech meets trust. And innovation isn’t a buzzword — it’s a way of life. The world of work as we know it is changing and we're looking for Trailblazers who are passionate about bettering business and the world through AI, driving innovation, and keeping Salesforce's core values at the heart of it all.
   

  

 Ready to level-up your career at the company leading workforce transformation in the agentic era? You’re in the right place! Agentforce is the future of AI, and you are the future of Salesforce.
   

  

****About Salesforce****
 Salesforce is the #1 AI CRM, where humans with agents drive customer success together. Here, ambition meets action. Tech meets trust. And innovation isn’t a buzzword — it’s a way of life. The world of work as we know it is changing and we're looking for Trailblazers who are passionate about bettering business and the world through AI, driving innovation, and keeping Salesforce's core values at the heart of it all.
   

  

 Ready to level-up your career at the company leading workforce transformation in the agentic era? You’re in the right place!
 **Agentforce** 
 is the future of AI, and you are the future of Salesforce.
   

  

****Job Description****
 At Salesforce, we are seeking outstanding individuals to join our team as Account Executives with a strong technical background and expertise in AI-driven solutions. In this role, you will be pivotal in driving revenue growth and encouraging enduring client relationships and applying innovative technology redefines customer engagements.
   

  

**Agentforce** 
 , our flagship innovation, harnesses the power of real-time data analytics and AI to redefine Customer 360, enabling scalable, high impact customer interactions.As a part of our Agentforce Specialist selling team, you will play a pivotal role in crafting customer engagement and delivering ground-breaking results!
   

  

 We are looking for individuals with deep AI knowledge and strong experience in selling complex technology solutions, understanding cloud-based services, and designing B2B solutions. Collaborating with potential clients, you will dive deep into understanding their needs and challenges ultimately showcasing how Agentforce is the solve for their most critical business goals.
   

  

****What You’ll Be Doing:****
* Employ your wealth of sales knowledge, with new technologies, and AI modeling to identify and position Agentforce opportunities with potential customers.
* Collaborate and work closely Salesforce Sales team to find opportunities to drive Agentforce growth at current and new customers
* Use your extensive knowledge of Salesforce particularly Agentforce to articulate to our customers how the Salesforce Product stack can deliver tailored solutions to transform their customer engagement while fitting within their existing architecture
* Conduct comprehensive technical discovery to analyze sophisticated business problems and demonstrate how Agentforce’s capabilities can deliver impact at scale
* Source and qualify Agentforce opportunities that fit our ideal customer profile.
* Demonstrate your adeptness at leading comprehensive discovery conversations, unearthing prospective customers’ critical business needs and resolving if and how Agentforce can be a solution.
* Conduct in-depth discovery sessions to assess client’s sophisticated business needs, demonstrating what Agentforce delivers as a detailed and scalable solution
* Craft and present compelling Points of View (POVs) that underscore the tangible value of Agentforce across both technical and business partners
* Collaborate across cross-functional teams to show up as “One Salesforce” and ensure a seamless client experience throughout the entire sales process
* Highlight how our solutions align seamlessly with clients' long-term strategic objectives
* Apply your outstanding ability to combine deep discovery with your own point of view to present compelling Agentforce use cases that resonate with buyers


****What You Should Have:****
* 10+ years of experience in enterprise and commercial B2B sales within the context of highly technical sales
* Deep understanding of AI and machine learning concepts, understanding of the agent platform, how to configure and set up agents, hook them into existing flows, automation, api connection, etc.
* Experience with AI-driven customer engagement solutions and the Salesforce platform (i.e. Sales, Services, Marketing, Data Cloud)
* Sophisticated intuition for business and able to conduct technical in-depth discovery mapping aligning clients needs to Salesforce's platform and Agentforce capabilities
* Strong technical selling skills including the ability to explain AI models ad solutions to non-technical clients and how AI capabilities and solutions can translate to business outcomes
* A proven track record of consistently surpassing sales targets within a technical sales environment, underscoring your proficiency in intricate sales processes.
* Outstanding communication and negotiation skills honed through your experience
* A Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience with extensive background in technology sales


****Skill-Set/Technologies:****
 Salesforce platform (Sales, Service, Marketing Clouds), technical sales, negotiation techniques, Cloud Data Warehouse technologies, Cloud infrastructure, Predictive and prescriptive modeling techniques, Business Intelligence (Tableau). Salesforce Data Cloud.
   

  

****Characteristics:****
* This role requires an outstanding blend of technical depth, sales competence, and can articulate complex AI-driven solutions to a mix of customers.
* Results motivated: you show your ability to exceed sales goals.
* Business-focused outlook: Skillfully translates technical solutions into palpable business value
* A talent for relationship-building: Establishes enduring client connections, rooted in your extensive sales expertise.
* A curiosity about problem-solving: Devises innovative solutions to address sophisticated client challenges, using your extensive technology sales experience
* Technical Skills: Ability to understand sophisticated technical solutions and clearly articulate business value to businesses and technical partners
* Creativity. Agile, roll-up-your-sleeves demeanor. Progress over perfection.


 Unleash Your Potential
   

  

 When you join Salesforce, you’ll be limitless in all areas of your life. Our benefits and resources support you to find balance and
 *be your best* 
 , and our AI agents accelerate your impact so you can
 *do your best* 
 . Together, we’ll bring the power of Agentforce to organizations of all sizes and deliver amazing experiences that customers love. Apply today to not only shape the future — but to redefine what’s possible — for yourself, for AI, and the world.
   

  

 Accommodations
   

  

 If you need a reasonable accommodation during the application or the recruiting process, please submit a request via this Accommodations Request Form.
   

  

 Please note that Salesforce uses artificial intelligence (AI) tools to help our recruiters assess and evaluate candidates’ resumes and qualifications throughout the recruiting process. Humans will always make any candidate selection and hiring decisions. Please see our Candidate Privacy Statement for more information about how we use your personal data and your rights, including with regard to use of AI tools and opt out options.
   

  

 Posting Statement
   

  

 Salesforce is an equal opportunity employer and maintains a policy of non-discrimination with all employees and applicants for employment. What does that mean exactly? It means that at Salesforce, we believe in equality for all. And we believe we can lead the path to equality in part by creating a workplace that’s inclusive, and free from discrimination. Know your rights: workplace discrimination is illegal. Any employee or potential employee will be assessed on the basis of merit, competence and qualifications – without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender expression or identity, transgender status, age, disability, veteran or marital status, political viewpoint, or other classifications protected by law. This policy applies to current and prospective employees, no matter where they are in their Salesforce employment journey. It also applies to recruiting, hiring, job assignment, compensation, promotion, benefits, training, assessment of job performance, discipline, termination, and everything in between. Recruiting, hiring, and promotion decisions at Salesforce are fair and based on merit. The same goes for compensation, benefits, promotions, transfers, reduction in workforce, recall, training, and education.

title: Total Compensation (Senior) Specialist
description:
Beskrivning av tjänsten
   

  

 As part of our Human Resources team, you will work hands-on with compensation and benefits processes across the organization. This role focuses on the operational delivery and continuous improvement of Total Compensation programs, with a strong emphasis on data, reporting, and coordination.
   

  

 You will support compensation and benefits activities across the Scandinavian region, working closely with HR colleagues, stakeholders, and external partners in an advisory role. This is a great opportunity for someone who enjoys combining structure, analytics, and collaboration in a dynamic environment.
   

  

 This role offers great opportunities for international exposure and as a truly global company with excellent career opportunities, this could be the start of something amazing for the right candidate.
   

  

 To thrive in this role, you have a consultative communication style and possess broad technical expertise within the compensation and benefits area. In addition to this you have deep analytical skills and won’t stop until you have made sense of the facts and figures. You have mastered the craft of distilling large quantities of data into a meaningful format for decision making.
   

  

 Dina framtida arbetsuppgifter
   

  

* Support and coordinate annual processes such as salary review and other compensation cycles
* Prepare and maintain compensation reports, dashboards, and analysis
* Conduct benchmarking and market analysis to support decision-making
* Ensure data quality and support the development of standardized reporting and metrics
* Assist in the implementation and administration of compensation and benefits programs and tools
* Handle and resolve operational and escalated compensation-related queries
* Coordinate with external vendors and internal stakeholders
* Assist in compliance-related reporting and documentation


 Kvalifikationer för att bli framgångsrik denna roll
   

  

* Relevant academic degree in HR, Business Administration, Finance, or similar
* A few years of experience working with compensation, benefits, or HR analytics
* Advanced knowledge of Excel and experience working with data and reporting
* Ability to manage multiple tasks and stakeholders in a structured way
* Strong attention to detail and a service-oriented mindset
* Beyond the numbers, you are a skilled communicator who enjoys engaging with employees and union representatives. You have the pedagogical ability to explain compensation logic in a way that builds clarity and trust across the organization
* Fluent in English and preferably one of the Scandinavian languages


 What we offer
   

  

 You will be part of a collaborative and international environment where you will gain exposure to a broad range of Total Compensation topics. The role offers opportunities to develop your expertise within compensation and benefits while contributing to impactful HR processes.
   

  

 We offer flexible working conditions with a combination of remote work and office presence.
   

  

 If you have any questions, please reach out to responsible recruiter Kristoffer Johansson, Talent Acquisition Manager, kr.johansson@cgi.com +46 709 38 78 18.
   

  

 Please apply as soon as possible as we will be interviewing candidates continuously.
   

  

**Låt oss som ägare omvandla verklig insikt till handling – tillsammans.**
 Livet på CGI bygger på ägande, lagarbete, respekt och tillhörighet. Tillsammans med oss kommer du att kunna nå din fulla potential.
   

  

 Du är inbjuden att ta ägandeskap redan från första dagen i vårt arbete med att förverkliga vår dröm om att skapa en arbetsmiljö där vi trivs med att arbeta tillsammans och bidrar till framgången för vårt företag. Det är därför vi kallar oss CGI Partners snarare än anställda. Vi drar nytta av vår kollektiva framgång och tillsammans får vi möjlighet att aktivt forma vår företagsstrategi och inriktning.
   

  

 Ditt arbete skapar värde. Du kommer att vara med att utveckla innovativa lösningar och bygga relationer med medarbetare och kunder samtidigt som du får tillgång till globala möjligheter att skala upp dina idéer, omfamna nya möjligheter och dra nytta av gedigen bransch- och teknikexpertis.
   

  

 Du kommer att forma din karriär tillsammans med ett företag som är byggt för att växa och bestå. Du får stöd av ledare som bryr sig om din hälsa och ditt välbefinnande och ger dig möjligheter att fördjupa dina kunskaper och vidga dina vyer.
   

  

 Bli en del en av världens största leverantörer av IT- och affärskonsulttjänster.

title: Principal Software Engineer, Platform (Bangkok Based – relocation provided)
description:
**About Agoda**
 At Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. Our story began in 2005, when two lifelong friends and entrepreneurs, driven by their passion for travel, launched Agoda to make it easier for everyone to explore the world.
   

  

 Today, we are part of Booking Holdings [NASDAQ: BKNG], with a diverse team of over 7,000 people from 90 countries, working together in offices around the globe. Every day, we connect people to destinations and experiences, with our great deals across our millions of hotels and holiday properties, flights, and experiences worldwide.
   

  

 No two days are the same at Agoda. Data and technology are at the heart of our culture, fueling our curiosity and innovation. If you’re ready to begin your best journey and help build travel for the world, join us.
   

  

**The Opportunity:**
 DevOps Engineering team is tasked with creating automation into the Software Development Lifecycle concerning all Agoda’s R&D. The team is responsible for maintaining all central Dev-related tooling chain and develop internal tools/Web Portals in order to increase development efficiency and security. The impact of this engineering team affects all development in Agoda.
   

  

**In this Role, you’ll get to:**
* Maintain CI/CD best practices and automating security testing at the speed of DevOps
* Maintain all central Dev-related systems for source control, CI, Service Discovery, and more.
* Bridging the gap between Development and Operations
* Full-stack development for internal portals and tooling


**What you’ll Need to Succeed:**
* 10+ years of experience in Software Engineering / DevOps / Platform Engineering, with at least several years operating in a senior or principal capacity.
* Hands-on experience with the whole SDLC: Requirement, Design, Code, Test, Deploy
* Great coding skills in a modern programming language (preferably Python/Go)
* Knowledge of Development ecosystem tooling: Git/CI/Docker/Kubernetes
* Passion for learning cutting-edge technologies and automating large scale processes
* Software architecture design skills for maintaining High Availability and Fault Tolerance
* Linux system administration skills


**It’s Great if you have:**
* Experience with Configuration Management tools (preferably Ansible)
* Experience coding a Full Stack application (preferably with React.js and Go)
* Experience working with OpenStack
* Experience working with Container orchestration (preferably Kubernetes)
* Experience with Hashicorp tools (Consul / Vault)
* Experience with both SQL/NoSQL databses (PostgreSQL, Elastic, MSSQL)

 At Agoda, we pride ourselves on being a company represented by people of all different backgrounds and orientations.
