title: Produktspecialist till Tre
description:
Vill du vara med och forma framtidens kundservice hos oss på Tre? Som produktspecialist spelar du en nyckelroll i att utveckla och förbättra våra kundservicesystem, de verktyg som våra medarbetare på kundservice använder varje dag för att leverera service i toppklass. Med ett tydligt fokus på AI och innovation är du med och driver utvecklingen framåt och skapar ännu bättre kundupplevelser – hur trevligt ?
   

  

**Lite mer om rollen**
 Som produktspecialist har du konfigureringsansvaret för våra kundservicesystem, bl.a. Genesys Cloud och Boost.ai. I rollen driver du utvecklingen framåt genom att förstå behoven hos både användare och kunder, säkerställa att systemen är rätt uppsatta för att skapa största möjliga nytta för våra medarbetare och för att bidra till en så bra kundupplevelse som möjligt.
   

  

 Du har fokus på våra kundservicekanaler inom telefoni och mejl. Här vidareutvecklar du vår voicebot för att bredda dess förmåga, höja svarskvaliteten och göra den mer hjälpsam för våra kunder. Du bidrar även till att effektivisera vår telefoni-setup genom att säkerställa att rätt information fångas tidigt i kundresan. Dessutom arbetar du med att införa AI- och automationslösningar i mejlkanalen för att förenkla och snabba upp ärendehanteringen.
   

  

**Du kan se fram emot att**
* få chansen att vara med och forma framtidens kundservice och digitala lösningar
* bli en del av ett team i framkant, med höga ambitioner och med målet att bygga branschens bästa kundservice ✨
* jobba i en spännande, utvecklande och varierande roll som har touch points på olika områden inom organisationen
* vara en del av Sveriges bästa arbetsplatser enligt Great Place To Work
* tillhöra en arbetsgivare som vill bidra till att kvinnor vill välja och stanna kvar inom teknikbranschen, vi är stolta partners till Women in Tech och Tjejer Kodar


 ,
   

  

**Lite mer om dig**
 Vi söker dig som har minst 2 års erfarenhet från en liknande roll, där du har arbetat med utveckling och/eller konfigurering av SaaS-system. Du har god förståelse för Contact Center plattformar såsom Genesys cloud, Zendesk, Boost.ai. Likväl har du erfarenhet av att förbättra kundupplevelser, processer samt arbete med digitalisering och automatisering. Det är meriterande om du har erfarenhet av arbete inom eller mot kundservice sedan tidigare samt om du har en yrkes- eller högskoleexamen inom relevant inriktning, exempelvis systemvetenskap. Då vi verkar i en internationell miljö ser vi gärna att du är bekväm med att kommunicera både på svenska och engelska.
   

  

 Samarbete med olika typer av människor faller sig naturligt för dig, liksom förmågan att göra sig förstådd i olika sammanhang. För att trivas i rollen tror vi att ett intresse för att hitta lösningar på problem är viktigt, tillsammans med ett nyfiket förhållningssätt där du vågar utmana invanda arbetssätt och driva utveckling framåt. Ett genuint teknikintresse och en förmåga att snabbt sätta dig in i nya system och applikationer kommer att vara en stor tillgång i rollen. Rollen passar också dig som trivs med att arbeta självständigt och gillar att ta ett tydligt eget ansvar.
   

  

**Om anställningen**
 I rollen blir du en del av Customer Experience Development & Automation och och du rapporterar till Team Manager Henrik Sundvall. Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning med start enligt överenskommelse och du välkomnas till vårt härliga kontor 3Huset vid Globen.
   

  

**Välkommen med din ansökan!**
 Vi tar emot ansökningar via denna annons och håller intervjuer löpande. Personligt brev behövs inte, men vi vill gärna att du bifogar CV och svarar på de frågor vi ställt nedan i samband med att du söker. Vi använder tester för att säkra objektiva bedömningar i samband med urval. Tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdag. Bakgrundskontroll görs på slutkandidat innan beslut om anställning fattas.
   

  

 För mer information om tjänsten kontakta rekryterande chef Henrik Sundvall på: Henrik.Sundvall@tre.se

title: SAP Finance & Procure to Pay Consultant
description:
Role: S/4HANA SME – Finance (A&C / FIM / Controlling / Procure-to-Pay) (Senior)
 



 Workload: 100%
 



 Language: English & Swedish (Strict Language requirement)
 



 Location: Solna / Uppsala / Jordbro (Location can be flexible, ability to travel important)
 



 Role Purpose
 



 You will act as BU Heat’s Senior S/4HANA QA SME across Finance and ProcuretoPay (P2P), ensuring that endtoend business requirements are translated into highquality test coverage and that Financerelevant data and migration dependencies are validated throughout SIT, E2E and UAT.
 



 You will support the streams with requirement understanding, test design, test data preparation and migration validation, ensuring that integrated Finance and P2P solutions meet business needs and are ready for golive from both a process and financial posting perspective.
 



 Key Responsibilities:
 


* Deeply understand and validate Finance and P2P requirements and key process flows
* (A&C / FIM / Controlling / Procurement / Purchasing)
* Create, maintain and review integrated test cases mapped to:
* Business requirements
* Stream design
* Expected accounting and controlling outcomes
* Ensure traceability between requirements, test cases and expected financial postings.
* Support SIT / E2E / UAT execution by:
* Clarifying expected results
* Supporting test data setup
* Analysing defects
* Identifying Financerelevant root causes
* Drive preparation and validation of test data across:
* Vendors
* Materials
* Purchasing structures
* Finance master and transactional data
* Support migration and cutover validation from a Finance & P2P perspective including:
* Data completeness
* Data correctness
* Process continuity
* Signoff readiness



 Required Experience
 


* Strong SAP S/4HANA Finance / Controlling and ProcuretoPay background.
* Handson experience in QA / test case design and defect collaboration in SAP programs.
* Comfortable working closely with both Business and IT teams in a transformation context.
* Senior SAP S/4HANA SME with a solid track record from large SAP ECC → S/4HANA transformations (complex, multistream environments).
* Experience supporting SIT / E2E / UAT execution and migration validation.
* Swedish is required (fluent written & spoken) — you will work daytoday in Swedish with the streams.



 More about the role:
 


* Act as our S/4HANA and Test experts for Wave 2.
* Map IBS scenarios (E2) to gaps in Azure DevOps for our BA/BU.
* Design system test cases for the program, design SIT test cases for BU Heat, and design IBS test cases (including mapping test cases to IBS).
* Design missing test cases to ensure full process coverage and ensure a high level of detail and quality in all test cases.
* Identify and create test data.
* Work as testers during System Testing (ST), System Integration Testing (SIT), and User Acceptance Testing (UAT).
* Coordinate IBS and internal test cases to ensure full end-to-end (E2E) traceability and alignment.
* Work cross-functionally within BU Heat Sweden to ensure 100% coverage of IBS test cases for UAT.



 Also operate as a “test factory,” taking responsibility for test design, planning, execution, and test reporting

title: Fullstack Enterprise Engineer
description:
**TL;DR**
 We're looking for an exceptional Fullstack Engineer to build the enterprise foundation of Lovable. You'll own the work that lets Lovable-built apps run wherever the largest companies in the world need them to run — across every major hyperscaler, and deeply connected to the enterprise systems their teams already use every day.
   

  

**Why Lovable?**
 Lovable lets anyone build software with plain English. From solopreneurs to Fortune 100 teams, millions of people use Lovable to transform raw ideas into real products — fast. We are at the forefront of a fundamental shift in how software is created: from code-first to intelligence-first.
   

  

 Millions people in 200+ countries already use Lovable, and our enterprise footprint is compounding fast.
   

  

 We're a small, talent-dense team building a generation-defining company. We operate with high ownership, high velocity, and low-ego collaboration. We care deeply, move fast, and are here to build something that outlives us.
   

  

**What makes this role special?**
 You'll own two surfaces of the core product end-to-end:
   

  

* Where Lovable apps run. We're looking for engineers fluent in the building blocks that take a product from one cloud to many — containers, Kubernetes, infrastructure-as-code, private networking, customer-managed keys, audit. The kind of work that turns "it runs on my laptop" into "it runs in a regulated bank's cloud."
* What Lovable apps connect to. Deep, durable integrations with the enterprise platforms and SaaS systems our customers already depend on — identity providers, data platforms, business systems, productivity suites. Each connector is a leverage point: build it once, and every Lovable app at every enterprise customer benefits.


 You won't be in a separate "enterprise team" shipping into a corner of the product. You'll work in the core, and your work will be visible to every paying enterprise customer.
   

  

**What We're Looking For**
* 5+ years of experience building and shipping full-stack products, with meaningful time on systems that real businesses depend on
* Fluent in modern frontend (React/TypeScript) and backend development (Go and/or Rust, or strong adjacent experience and a track record of picking up new stacks quickly)
* Hands-on experience deploying production systems across more than one hyperscaler (AWS, GCP, Azure)
* Comfort with the building blocks that make multi-cloud real: Kubernetes, containers, infrastructure-as-code (Terraform), private networking, identity, secrets and key management
* A track record of building integrations against third-party APIs and SDKs — especially the kind that have to keep working reliably for years across customer-specific configurations
* Strong systems design instincts — you can reason about isolation, blast radius, performance, and security trade-offs without losing sight of product
* Strong product sense — you know when to invest in foundations and when to ship a solution that unblocks a customer this week


 Bonus if you've:
   

  

* Shipped a product that runs across multiple hyperscalers, or built customer-cloud deployment for a SaaS product
* Built or operated Kubernetes operators, deployment platforms, or multi-cloud control planes
* Built integrations or connectors against major enterprise platforms (identity, data, productivity, or business systems)
* Owned compliance-adjacent work (SOC 2, ISO 27001) from the engineering side
* Worked in a founding or early startup environment


**What You'll Do**
 In one sentence: Make Lovable the obvious choice for the largest companies in the world — wherever they run, and whatever they're already running.
   

  

* Design and ship the systems that let Lovable-built apps deploy across multiple hyperscalers and into customer-controlled cloud environments
* Build and own connectors that integrate Lovable cleanly with the enterprise platforms our customers already use
* Own systems from architecture through implementation, deployment, and iteration in production
* Partner closely with our Forward Deployed Engineers and Product Managers to turn real customer requirements into durable platform capability — not bespoke one-offs
* Work with security, infra, and product to keep the enterprise surface coherent as the rest of the product evolves around it
* Contribute to shaping our technical direction, engineering culture, and product strategy


**Our tech stack**
 We choose tools that empower both humans and AI:
   

  

* Frontend: React, TypeScript
* Backend: Golang and Rust
* Cloud: Cloudflare, GCP, AWS, multiple LLM providers
* Tooling: GitHub Actions, OTEL, Grafana, Terraform, and more
* Always evolving with what works best


**How We Hire**
* Fill out a short form and hop on a brief intro call with our recruiting team
* Complete a quick live coding exercise
* Show us how you approach problems during several technical interviews
* Show us something you've built that makes you proud


**About Your Application**
* Please submit your application in English — it’s our company language
* We treat all candidates equally — if you're interested, please apply through our careers portal


**Ready to join us?**
 Help us unlock human creativity and build the future of software creation.

title: Sales Executive - New Business Cision Nordics - (18 months Fixed-Term)
description:
At Cision, we believe in empowering every individual to make an impact. Here, your voice is heard, your ideas are valued, and your unique perspective fuels our collective success. As part of our global team, you'll thrive in an environment that champions curiosity, collaboration, and innovation, all while making meaningful contributions to the brands we accelerate.
   

  

 Join us in shaping the future of communication and building authentic connections that matter. Whether you're solving complex problems or driving bold innovations, your growth is our success, and together, we’ll create the conversations of tomorrow.
   

  

**Empower your impact at Cision. Be seen, be understood, be you.**
 Cision is looking for a driven Sales Executive to accelerate new business growth across the Nordic market for the next 18 months with possibility of extension.
   

  

 In this role, you will own the full sales cycle and work consultatively with senior decision makers in marketing, communications and executive leadership teams. Your mission is to identify opportunities, build strong relationships, and demonstrate how Cision’s SaaS solutions create measurable value for organizations.
   

  

 Reporting to the Sales Director, you will be responsible for building a strong pipeline and consistently delivering against ambitious revenue targets.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Own the full sales cycle: prospecting, discovery, demo, proposal and closing
* Build and maintain a strong pipeline of Nordic prospects
* Engage with PR, Marketing and Executive stakeholders
* Conduct consultative sales conversations to identify business challenges
* Deliver tailored product presentations and value-based proposals
* Negotiate contracts and close new business deals
* Achieve and exceed monthly and quarterly revenue targets
* Maintain strong knowledge of the PR, communications and media tech landscape


**Requirements**
* Bachelors degree or equivalent in relevant area
* Experience or strong interest in B2B sales, preferably SaaS
* Highly driven with a results-oriented mindset
* Strong communication and presentation skills
* Fluent in Swedish and English
* Comfortable working in a fast-paced, target-driven environment


 As a global leader in PR, marketing and social media management technology and intelligence, Cision helps brands and organizations to identify, connect and engage with customers and stakeholders to drive business results. PR Newswire, a network of over 1.1 billion influencers, in-depth monitoring, analytics and its Brandwatch and Falcon.io social media platforms headline a premier suite of solutions. Cision has offices in 24 countries throughout the Americas, EMEA and APAC. For more information about Cision's award-winning solutions, including its next-gen Cision Communications Cloud®, visit www.cision.com and follow @Cision on Twitter.
   

  

 Cision is committed to fostering an inclusive environment where all employees can be their authentic selves and perform at their best. We believe diversity, equity, and inclusion is vital to driving our culture, sparking innovation and achieving long-term success. Cision is proud to have joined more than 600 companies in signing the CEO Action for Diversity & Inclusion™ pledge and named a “Top Diversity Employer” for 2021 by DiversityJobs.com.
   

  

 Cision is proud to be an equal opportunity employer, seeking to create a welcoming and diverse environment. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, disability, age, veteran status, or other protected statuses.
   

  

 Cision is committed to the full inclusion of all qualified individuals. In keeping with our commitment, Cision will take the steps to assure that people with disabilities are provided reasonable accommodations. Accordingly, if reasonable accommodation is required to fully participate in the job application or interview process, to perform the essential functions of the position, and/or to receive all other benefits and privileges of employment, please contact hr.support@cision.com
   

  

 Please review our Global Candidate Data Privacy Statement to learn about Cision’s commitment to protecting personal data collected during the hiring process.

title: Senior Solution Architect Dynamics 365 Finance
description:
*Vi har en stark position inom Data & AI samt Business Application och nu söker vi dig som har gedigen erfarenhet av Dynamics 365 Finance & Supply Chain.
   

  

 Hos oss får du möjlighet att leda utvecklingen av framtidens lösningar och driva vår strategi mot autonoma ERP, tillsammans med några av branschens främsta experter.
   

  

 Låter det spännande? Då är den här rollen något för dig!*
 Din roll hos oss
   

  

 Du leder designmöten och workshops, coachar kollegor och säkerställer att våra lösningar gör verklig skillnad för kund. Vi arbetar agilt i harmoni med Microsofts arbetssätt (FastTrack, Solution by Design) och vårt eget ramverk DAM – Digital Adoption Model, baserat på Scrum. Hos oss jobbar vi alltid i teamleveranser – vi tror på att det ger bäst resultat för både kund och medarbetare.
   

  

 Vi vill jobba med dig som
   

  

 Har gedigen erfarenhet av Dynamics 365 Finance och har en bred ERP-profil med förståelse för exempelvis finansprocesser inom fastighetsbranschen, detaljhandel eller industri.
   

  

 Du gillar digitala utmaningar och vill skapa nästa generations verksamhetsprocesser med fokus på automatiserade flöden. Din analytiska förmåga, kommunikativa styrka och erfarenhet gör dig till en självklar ledare i våra projekt.
   

  

**Vi Söker Dig Som**
* Har ca 7+ års erfarenhet av implementationsprojekt inom Dynamics 365 Finance & Supply Chain
* Har ansvarat för arkitekturdesign och säkerställt att lösningar möter affärsbehov
* Är van vid agila projekt och vill bidra till att utveckla vårt arbetssätt


 Vårt team
   

  

 Hos oss möter du en blandning av engagerade och ödmjuka människor med olika bakgrund och intressen. Vi värdesätter humor, glädje och gemenskap, och ser till att du får utrymme för både professionell och personlig utveckling. Genom kompetensdelning och teamaktiviteter blir vi tillsammans de vassaste konsulterna på marknaden – och skapar den energi som behövs för att bidra med förändring hos våra kunder.
   

  

 Kompensation och förmåner
   

  

 Vår förmånspolicy är utvecklad för att möta både dina professionella och personliga behov. I vårt omfattande förmånspaket ingår friskvårdsbidrag, tjänstepension och sjukvårdsförsäkring. Vår ersättningsmodell består av en konkurrenskraftig fast del och en rörlig del som ger dig möjlighet att påverka din lön baserat på din prestation och ambition. Detta ger dig frihet att balansera din ersättningsnivå med dina livsprioriteringar.
   

  

**Nyfiken?** 
 Hör av dig till oss – vi tar gärna en kaffe och berättar mer: amir.hosseini@accigo.se
   

  

 Accigo är ett konsultbolag som hjälper företag och organisationer med digital affärs- och verksamhetsutveckling med tekniken som möjliggörare. För oss handlar digitalisering till 90% om människor och 10% om teknik. Det är när samspelet mellan människa och teknik fungerar som digitaliseringens fulla styrka visar sig.
   

  

 För många handlar digitalisering mest om teknik. För oss är det så otroligt mycket större. Digitalisering kan få både människor och organisationer att våga sikta högre, följa sina drömmar och öppna dörrar som de inte ens visste fanns. Och när man ser igenom tekniken och börjar skönja vilka möjligheter som gömmer sig där bakom. Då ser man att framtiden kan vara en fantastisk plats – fylld av mänsklig energi och värme – och digitalisering är inget annat än vår superkraft för att komma dit.

title: HR Advisor - Nordics
description:
HR Advisor - Nordics
 



 Contract: full-time, permanent
   

 Location: Stockholms Central (2/3 days onsite)
   

 Reports to: Global Head of HR Operations
 




 Are you an experienced HR professional passionate about delivering exceptional employee experiences and operational excellence? Do you thrive in dynamic, collaborative environments where your expertise can make a real impact? If so, we have an exciting opportunity for you!
 



 We're seeking a skilled
 **HR Advisor** 
 to join our globally recognised organisation, supporting employees across Sweden, Denmark, and Norway from our central Stockholm office. With flexible hybrid working arrangements, this role offers the perfect balance of strategic influence and hands-on HR responsibilities. You'll play a pivotal role in shaping people processes, ensuring compliance, and fostering a positive workplace culture-all while collaborating with colleagues across regions to deliver best-in-class HR support.
 



 If you're ready to take the next step in your career within a forward-thinking company that values curiosity, collaboration, and continuous improvement, this is the opportunity you've been waiting for.
   

  




 Why Join Us?
   

  

* **Global Impact:** 
 Be part of a pioneering organisation at the forefront of cloud-based spend management technology, empowering over 4,000 customers worldwide with cutting-edge solutions.
* **Flexible Working:** 
 Enjoy hybrid working arrangements based in central Stockholm-combining the energy of office collaboration with the flexibility of remote productivity.
* **Inclusive Culture:** 
 Thrive in an environment that champions diversity, personal growth, and teamwork. Your contributions will help shape the future of finance teams across the Nordic region and beyond.


 Your Role: What You'll Do
   

  


 As our
 **HR Advisor - Nordics** 
 , you'll take ownership of end-to-end HR operations for employees across Sweden, Denmark, and Norway. From onboarding new hires to advising managers on best practices and ensuring compliance with local employment laws, no two days will be the same. Here's what you can expect:
 


* **Be the Go-To Expert:** 
 Serve as the primary point of contact for all HR processes in Sweden, Denmark, and Norway-ensuring full compliance with local employment laws and regulations.
* **Support Managers & Employees:** 
 Provide clear guidance on policies, procedures, and best practices to foster a consistent and supportive workplace environment.
* **Policy Governance:** 
 Keep HR policies up-to-date by monitoring legislative changes and recommending updates to ensure compliance.
* **Seamless Employee Journeys:** 
 Lead onboarding and offboarding processes-from contract signing to benefits enrolment-ensuring every transition is smooth and efficient.
* **Payroll & Benefits Administration:** 
 Collaborate closely with Payroll and Benefits teams to manage accurate payroll processing and resolve complex queries.
* **HRIS Management:** 
 Maintain data integrity within our HRIS (HiBob), conduct regular audits, optimise workflows, and implement scalable improvements.
* **Employee Relations:** 
 Handle sensitive matters with empathy and professionalism while coaching managers through performance management or disciplinary actions.
* **Global Collaboration:** 
 Partner with international stakeholders across Payroll, Legal, IT, and Finance teams to align local needs with global initiatives.


 What You Bring: Skills & Experience
   

  


 To excel in this role, you'll need a combination of technical expertise, regional knowledge, and interpersonal skills:
 


* Proven experience (5+ years) in HR roles within Nordic countries such as Sweden, Denmark, or Norway.
* Strong understanding of Nordic employment laws with the ability to translate regulations into practical workplace policies.
* Hands-on experience managing payroll processes and benefits administration across multiple locations.
* Proficiency in using HRIS platforms (e.g., HiBob or similar) for data management, reporting, and process optimisation.
* Exceptional communication skills-able to coach managers sensitively while building trust at all levels of the organisation.
* A proactive mindset focused on continuous improvement; you're always looking for ways to enhance processes or policies.
* Experience working within global teams or EMEA markets is highly desirable; familiarity with other geographies like the Netherlands is a plus.
* Bachelor's degree in Human Resources or related field preferred (or equivalent experience). CIPD/SHRM certification is advantageous.


 What Sets Us Apart?
   

  


 At our core is a commitment to innovation and collaboration. Founded in Sweden but now operating globally across 10+ countries, we empower businesses through advanced automation powered by AI-driven insights. Our culture is built on shared values:
 


* **Connection:** 
 We respect each other's perspectives and work together toward common goals.
* **Curiosity:** 
 We challenge conventional thinking to find better solutions every day.
* **Ownership:** 
 We follow through on commitments because we believe accountability drives success.



 With flexible hybrid working options tailored around your lifestyle needs-and access to ongoing learning opportunities-you'll feel supported as you grow both personally and professionally.
   

  




 Ready to Make an Impact?
   

  


 If you're excited about shaping HR operations across Nordic countries within a globally respected organisation-and want your expertise valued every day-this could be your perfect next move!
 



**Apply today** 
 by clicking the link provided-we can't wait to hear from you!
   

  

  

  

  








**Robert Walters Operations Limited is an employment business and employment agency and welcomes applications from all candidates**

title: Backend engineer - Java
description:
We are seeking a collaborative and curious Engineer to help drive and develop our VCS infrastructure forward.
   

  

 Our Version Control System (VCS) is the heartbeat of the developer experience. Our massive growth serving 1 Billion customers has led to us closing in on operational limits and we hence need to improve our stack and automate certain workflows in order to continue providing our engineering teams with flawless builds, integrated insights, fast local iteration time and evolve our repo structure for speed and safety. This role will be part of a team collaboratively creating and owning our VCS infrastructure which aims to provide our developers with a streamlined, simple to use and safe build experience at scale..
   

  

 The role is located in the Platform Developer Experience (PDX) tribe within the Platform Mission. The PDX Studio oversees and owns the infrastructure that cuts across all engineering disciplines.
   

  

 What you'll do
   

  

 Execute on the clients future VCS infrastructure strategy that is able to serve 3000+ engineers doing 100’s of thousands of builds daily and beyond
   

  

 Support with Operational tasks keeping our systems healthy and uptodate
   

  

 Develop backend systems to enable automate and enable the engineers to develop software more efficiently
   

  

 Drive the automation and improvements of our chosen VCS across our current technical stacks.
   

  

 Collaborate with Infrastructure teams across the company to discover what a best in class VCS infrastructure means.
   

  

 Who you are
   

  

 You are an experienced engineering familiar with Linux and Networking fundamentals
   

  

 You are an experienced Software Engineer with Java
   

  

 You have experience deploying to and implementing solutions in GCP or AWS.
   

  

 You believe in iteration and know that finding the right solution is more important than the first.
   

  

 You like to focus on standardization and automation; always looking for ways to improve the developer experience
   

  

 You have 6+ years of experience in building and implementing large-scale systems across various projects and teams
   

  

 You have familiarity with and enthusiasm for software engineering best practices such as testing, continuous integration, and continuous delivery
   

  

**Skills**
 Java Backend development experience
   

  

 Linux system experience
   

  

 AI experience is a must - we will be working on AI tooling as well
   

  

 HTTP / networking
   

  

 Google Cloud (preferred) / AWS Kubernetes
   

  

 Github (Administration / Operations) Gitlab would be advantageous (if they don’t have Github)
   

  

 Git expert
   

  

 Data experience - would be helpful
   

  

 Start: 2026-05-05
   

  

 End Date: 2026-12-31
   

  

 Workplace: Remote from Sweden. Candidates appyling from outside of Sweden will not be reviewed.

title: Senior SAP Project Manager | Complex Delivery & Governance
description:
**Introduction**
 A career in IBM Consulting is built on long-term client relationships and close collaboration worldwide. You’ll work with leading companies across industries, helping them shape their hybrid cloud and AI journeys. With support from our strategic partners, robust IBM technology, and Red Hat, you’ll have the tools to drive meaningful change and accelerate client impact. At IBM Consulting, curiosity fuels success. You’ll be encouraged to challenge the norm, explore new ideas, and create innovative solutions that deliver real results. Our culture of growth and empathy focuses on your long-term career development while valuing your unique skills and experiences.
   

  

**Your Role And Responsibilities**
 As a Complex Project Manager: SAP HANA, you will be responsible for managing complex SAP HANA projects from initiation to delivery, leading cross-functional teams to achieve successful project execution. Your expertise in SAP HANA, project management, and leadership will enable you to navigate complex project landscapes and deliver high-quality results that meet client expectations. Your primary responsibilities will include:
   

  

* Lead Cross-Functional Teams: Develop and execute project plans, ensuring collaboration and effective communication among team members to drive project success.
* Manage Project Landscapes: Navigate complex project environments, identifying and mitigating risks to ensure timely and within-budget delivery of high-quality results.
* Ensure Client Satisfaction: Deliver project outcomes that meet client expectations, fostering strong relationships and driving business growth through exceptional project management.
* Develop Project Plans: Create comprehensive project plans, outlining scope, timelines, and resource allocation to guide project execution and ensure successful delivery.
* Drive Project Execution: Oversee project progress, addressing issues and making informed decisions to ensure projects are completed on time, within budget, and to the required quality standards.


**Preferred Education**
 Master's Degree
   

  

**Required Technical And Professional Expertise**
* Deep Expertise in SAP HANA: Proven experience with SAP HANA, including its application in complex project environments, to deliver high-quality results that meet client expectations.
* Complex Project Management: Experience in managing complex projects from initiation to delivery, including developing project plans, navigating project landscapes, and ensuring successful project execution.
* Leadership and Team Management: Experience leading cross-functional teams, ensuring collaboration and effective communication among team members to drive project success.
* Risk Mitigation and Issue Resolution: Experience identifying and mitigating risks, addressing issues, and making informed decisions to ensure projects are completed on time, within budget, and to the required quality standards.
* Client Relationship Management: Experience delivering project outcomes that meet client expectations, fostering strong relationships and driving business growth through exceptional project management.


**Preferred Technical And Professional Experience**
* Advanced SAP HANA Knowledge: Deep understanding of SAP HANA architecture, data modeling, and data warehousing concepts to deliver high-quality results in complex project environments.
* Agile Project Methodologies: Experience with agile project management methodologies, such as Scrum or Kanban, to drive project execution and ensure successful delivery.
* Cloud-Based Solutions: Familiarity with cloud-based solutions, such as SAP HANA Cloud, to navigate complex project landscapes and deliver project outcomes that meet client expectations.

title: Marketing Execution Senior Specialist
description:
**We help the world run better**
 At SAP, we keep it simple: you bring your best to us, and we'll bring out the best in you. We're builders touching over 20 industries and 80% of global commerce, and we need your unique talents to help shape what's next. The work is challenging – but it matters. You'll find a place where you can be yourself, prioritize your wellbeing, and truly belong. What's in it for you? Constant learning, skill growth, great benefits, and a team that wants you to grow and succeed.
   

  

**SCM & CX Marketing Execution Specialist**
**Key Responsibilities & Tasks**
 Spearhead demand generation and revenue growth for SAP, in alignment with the current go-to-market (GTM) strategy. Lead the development, execution, and optimization of a data-driven, customer-centric marketing strategy to drive demand, accelerate pipeline growth, and foster adoption within SCM and CX line of businesses in the Nordic region. Collaborate across the marketing organization to maximize overall return on marketing investment for SAP, amplifying impact beyond individual initiatives.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
* Translate global and regional strategies into locally relevant, high-impact customer journeys. Define and manage the marketing plan in assigned LoB areas, ensuring alignment with business priorities and measurable outcomes.
* Execute marketing program to attract the attention of new buyers and influencers, build demand, influence existing pipeline and drive adoption.
* Responsible for driving demand generation and acceleration through effective planning and execution of marketing programs including the relevant use of high-quality events, account-based marketing, data-driven marketing, customer success stories, digital marketing, and more
* Champion business impact over activity. Align marketing KPIs with sales goals, account plans, and pipeline metrics to ensure marketing contributes directly to revenue growth.
* Lead the end-to-end execution of integrated marketing programs, ensuring timely delivery, budget adherence, and operational excellence.
* Document campaign execution and lead management activities in the system of records, including CRM, reports, dashboards and scorecards.
* Use analytics and performance data to communicate proactively with sales to support the strategic decisions, optimize campaign effectiveness, and guide agile course correction.
* In compliance with SAP procurement policies, identify, engage, and contract suitable agencies to manage respective projects, including related budget and cost.


**What You Bring**
* Based Sweden
* Fluency in English + Swedish
* 1-3 years of marketing experience
* Knowledge in/with sales preferred
* Knowledge in B2B marketing preferred
* Knowledge in the IT industry preferred
* Experience in designing and executing integrated marketing campaigns.
* Good stakeholder management and communication skills.
* Agile mindset with a passion for innovation and continuous improvement.
* Ability to build strong relationships across diverse teams and with customers.


**Bring out your best**
 SAP innovations help more than four hundred thousand customers worldwide work together more efficiently and use business insight more effectively. Originally known for leadership in enterprise resource planning (ERP) software, SAP has evolved to become a market leader in end-to-end business application software and related services for database, analytics, intelligent technologies, and experience management. As a cloud company with two hundred million users and more than one hundred thousand employees worldwide, we are purpose-driven and future-focused, with a highly collaborative team ethic and commitment to personal development. Whether connecting global industries, people, or platforms, we help ensure every challenge gets the solution it deserves. At SAP, you can bring out your best.
   

  

**We win with inclusion**
 SAP’s culture of inclusion, focus on health and well-being, and flexible working models help ensure that everyone – regardless of background – feels included and can run at their best. At SAP, we believe we are made stronger by the unique capabilities and qualities that each person brings to our company, and we invest in our employees to inspire confidence and help everyone realize their full potential. We ultimately believe in unleashing all talent and creating a better world.
   

  

 SAP is committed to the values of Equal Employment Opportunity and provides accessibility accommodations to applicants with physical and/or mental disabilities. If you are interested in applying for employment with SAP and are in need of accommodation or special assistance to navigate our website or to complete your application, please send an e-mail with your request to Recruiting Operations Team: Careers@sap.com.

title: Channel Sales Manager - Northern Europe (Civil Construction)
description:
**Your Title:** 
 Channel Sales Manager - Northern Europe
   

  

**Job Location:** 
 Sweden - Danderyd or Remote in Sweden, Norway, Finland
   

  

**Division:** 
 Civil Construction Field Solutions CCFS
   

  

*Are you looking to be a part of an award-winning organization and one of the fastest growing technology companies that is transforming the construction landscape with innovative technology solutions?*
*Join our team! We will offer your versatile tasks in a diverse, inspiring and dynamic working environment with great colleagues. Apply as soon as possible! Please, submit your CV/application only in English.*
 In this position you will have a very specific focus on CEC Machine control solutions and Connected Site promotion with a primary focus on Northern Europe. You will be deeply involved in developing solid business relationships with Equipment Dealers.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
 You will provide sales and application support for distributors and potentially end users in the CEC product portfolio You will:
   

  

* Increase market share through the development of Connected Site solutions to existing accounts and new customers. You will also be able to develop customer interest on Trimble Continuum solutions to develop sales on the entire CEC solutions
* Sell through select and perhaps multiple channels of distribution and have large project involvement, and will develop strategic key end-user relationships to ensure the successful sale of all Trimble products and services. You will have a strong field presence across the Nordic region
* Be responsible for ongoing dealer development through the introduction, follow-up and ongoing involvement in Trimble’s channel development programs/workshops.


**Primary Responsibilities**
 You will report to the Nordic Regional Sales Manager. Together with the Regional Sales Manager, you will participate in the development and implementation of regionally assigned sales plans. You will be in interface with distributor management, operations, sales, service and support staff.
   

  

**You Will**
* Develop strong long term business development with regional equipment dealers and implementation of Trimble Technology Outlets
* Conduct on site distributor training and job site demonstrations together with the application engineers
* Be in interface with major regional accounts
* Conduct joint sales presentations with focus on Educational Presentations
* Drive the Annual Review Meetings with key accounts in each dealer territory
* Assist in the identification, procurement and subsequent training of distribution sales and application personnel
* Evaluate marketplace potential for all served markets and customer segments using Data Analytics services as available
* Assist in the development of and participation in, specific technical communications and training requirements such as Trimble Dimensions, Boot Camps, Construction News, and others
* Ensure new product release involvement by all dealers including local strategy, training and proper inventory
* Provide input on competitive products and activities primarily to the CCFS Business Area
* Assist in the identification and development of new distribution.


**What Skills, Experience And Knowledge You Should Bring**
* Proven experience of successful consultative sales
* Experience in Channel development and management
* Business, sales, market and domain knowledge in survey, civil engineering and / or construction
* Ideally experienced in Technology solutions for Construction
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills
* Ability and willingness to travel up to+/- 50%
* Proficient knowledge of civil construction applications
* Product knowledge is a bonus
* Strong collaboration and relationship building skills
* Ability to prioritize, organize and manage multiple projects at one time
* Fluency in English and one Scandinavian language. Additional Nordic language skills are a bonus.


**About Our CCFS Division**
 Trimble's Civil Construction Field Solutions division focuses on providing advanced technology solutions to enhance productivity, accuracy, and efficiency in civil construction projects. This division integrates hardware and software tools to support the entire construction lifecycle, from initial site assessment and planning through to design, construction, and ongoing maintenance.
   

  

 Key offerings include machine control systems, site positioning systems, and software for project management and collaboration. These tools enable precise grading, excavation, paving, and site management, which help contractors and engineers streamline workflows, reduce rework, and improve overall project outcomes. For more information on currently developed products, see https://heavyindustry.trimble.com
   

  

**About Trimble**
 Dedicated to the world’s tomorrow, Trimble is a technology company delivering solutions that enable our customers to work in new ways to measure, build, grow and move goods for a better quality of life. Core technologies in positioning, modeling, connectivity and data analytics connect the digital and physical worlds to improve productivity, quality, safety, transparency and sustainability. From purpose-built products and enterprise lifecycle solutions to industry cloud services, Trimble is transforming critical industries such as construction, geospatial, agriculture and transportation to power an interconnected world of work. For more information about Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB), visit: https://www.trimble.com/en
   

  

**Trimble’s Inclusiveness Commitment**
 We believe in celebrating our differences. That is why our diversity is our strength. To us, that means actively participating in opportunities to be inclusive. Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion have guided our current success while also moving our desire to improve. We actively seek to add members to our community who represent our customers and the places we live and work.
   

  

 We have programs in place to make sure our people are seen, heard, and welcomed and most importantly that they know they belong, no matter who they are or where they are coming from.
   

  

**Trimble’s Privacy Policy**
****How to Apply:****
 Please submit an online application for this position by clicking on the ‘Apply Now’ button located in this posting.
   

  

****Join a Values-Driven Team: Belong, Grow, Innovate.****
 At Trimble, our core values of Belong, Grow, and Innovate aren't just words—they're the foundation of our culture. We foster an environment where you are seen, heard, and valued (Belong); where you have an opportunity to build a career and drive our collective growth (Grow); and where your innovative ideas shape the future (Innovate). We believe in empowering local teams to create impactful strategies, ensuring our global vision resonates with every individual. Become part of a team where your contributions truly matter.
   

  

 Trimble’s Privacy Policy
   

  

 If you need assistance or would like to request an accommodation in connection with the application process, please contact AskPX@px.trimble.com.

title: Automotive Software Engineers
description:
**Översikt**
------------


Vi söker nu flera Automotive Software Engineers till spännande uppdrag inom fordonsindustrin. Detta är en bred roll där du får möjlighet att arbeta med allt från låg-nivå embedded-utveckling till systemdesign, integration och verifiering. Du blir en del av teknikintensiva projekt med fokus på framtidens mobilitet - elektrifiering, autonomi, uppkoppling och säkerhet. Rollen passar dig som vill arbeta i en dynamisk miljö med högt tempo, där du får bidra i hela utvecklingskedjan - från kravställning till implementation och test.



**Position**
------------


Som Automotive Software Engineer arbetar du i tvärfunktionella team tillsammans med systemingenjörer, testare och andra utvecklare. Beroende på uppdrag kan du arbeta med utveckling, integration eller verifiering av mjukvara i fordonssystem.



**Din profil**
--------------


* Self-driven, highly communicative och en proaktiv teamspelare som har lätt för att se helheten på systemnivå.
* Nyfiken, innovativ och med en stark vilja att kontinuerligt lära sig nytt.
* Strukturerad och lösningsorienterad i ditt arbetssätt.
* Trygg i samarbeten och bidrar aktivt i team.
* Ansvarstagande och kvalitetsmedveten.
**Kvalifikationer**
-------------------


* Högskole- eller civilingenjörsexamen (M.Sc) inom Software Engineering, Computer Science, elektroteknik eller motsvarande.
* Minst 8 års erfarenhet av mjukvaruutveckling.
* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av C++ (eller C).
* Erfarenhet av CI/CD, enhetstester och integrationstester.
* Erfarenhet av Linux samt verktyg som Git/Gerrit, Bazel och CMake.
* Kunskap i Python.
* Goda kunskaper i engelska, både i tal och skrift.
* Arbete med realtidssystem och kommunikationsprotokoll (t.ex. CAN, LIN, Ethernet).
* Integration och test av mjukvara i olika miljöer (SIL, HIL, rigg eller fordon).
* Felsökning och analys av mjukvaruproblem.
* Deltagande i kravhantering och systemdesign.
* Arbete enligt Automotive-standarder och processer (t.ex. ASPICE, V-modellen).
* Samarbete med globala team och leverantörer.
**Meriterande**
---------------


* Erfarenhet från fordonsindustrin.
* Kunskap inom funktionell säkerhet (ISO 26262).
* Erfarenhet av Cyber Security inom mjukvaruutveckling.
* Erfarenhet av AUTOSAR (Classic eller Adaptive).
* Erfarenhet av modellbaserad utveckling (Simulink/Matlab).
* Kunskap i QNX, Bash, JSON, YAML.
* Erfarenhet av testverktyg såsom Google Test eller Python-baserade testframeworks.
* Vana av CI/CD-pipelines och testautomation i större system.
**Expertis**
------------


Tjänsten riktar sig främst till seniora profiler med gedigen erfarenhet inom automotive mjukvaruutveckling. Bred teknisk förståelse och förmåga att arbeta i olika delar av utvecklingskedjan är starkt meriterande.

title: Provcellsingenjör / Test Bed Engineer
description:
**Provcellsingenjör / Test Bed Engineer**
=========================================

  

Är du en lagspelare med passion för teknik, fordon och framtidens drivlinor? Då kan du vara den vi söker!

  



Vi söker dig som trivs med varierande arbetsuppgifter – både praktiska och teoretiska – och som vill vara en del av utvecklingen av morgondagens teknik. Just nu söker vi provcellsingenjörer till vår anläggning i Haninge.

  



AVL är en ledande partner inom automotive- och energiindustrin med fokus på utveckling, provning och simulering. AVL MTC, vårt svenska dotterbolag, har cirka 250 medarbetare baserade i Göteborg, Haninge, Stockholm och Södertälje. Som ingenjör på AVL samarbetar du med experter både i våra lokala och globala team, men även tillsammans med våra framgångsrika kunder. Du arbetar också med teknik i framkant.

  


**DINA ANSVARSOMRÅDEN:**

  


Som provcellsingenjör arbetar du nära både teknik och kund och ansvarar för att säkerställa att provobjekt och provceller fungerar optimalt genom hela testprocessen. Du förbereder, installerar och övervakar provobjekt och utför kalibrering, service och underhåll av både provobjekt och provcell. I rollen ingår att kvalitetssäkra och analysera provdata samt att konfigurera mätsystem, både hårdvara och mjukvara. Du arbetar systematiskt med felsökning och dokumentation, samtidigt som du utför praktiskt arbete med testutrustning, godshantering och logistik. Arbetet innebär även att du identifierar och rapporterar avvikelser samt har daglig kontakt och nära samarbete med kund, vilket gör kommunikation och relationsbyggande till en central del av din vardag.

  


**DIN PROFIL:**

  


För att lyckas i rollen tror vi att du har:


* Förmåga att arbeta både självständigt och i team
* En stark vilja att utvecklas och lära dig nytt
* Erfarenhet av praktiskt mekaniskt arbete med fordon, maskiner eller liknande
* Förståelse för vikten av att följa processer och rutiner, men också förmåga att lösa problem på egen hand
* Ett kvalitetsmedvetet arbetssätt och intresse för förbättringsarbete
* God teknisk förståelse för fordon och dess komponenter
* Förmåga att kommunicera tydligt på både svenska och engelska, i tal och skrift
* Möjlighet att arbeta enligt skiftschema (2-, 3- eller 4-skift)
* B-körkort (krav)

  


**Meriterande**:


* Eftergymnasial utbildning inom relevant tekniskt område
* Erfarenhet av provning eller utveckling i kontrollerad miljö
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av kundnära arbete

  





**VI ERBJUDER:**

  


På AVL blir du en del av ett globalt teknikföretag som ligger i framkant av utveckling, simulering och testning inom mobilitetens framtid. Som världens största oberoende aktör inom området, med över 12 000 medarbetare internationellt, driver vi innovation för en grönare, säkrare och bättre värld av mobilitet.

  



Vårt fokus sträcker sig över hela värdekedjan – från tidiga idé- och konceptfaser till industrialisering och serieproduktion. Vi arbetar med avancerad teknik inom elektrifiering, mjukvara, autonom körning, digitalisering och energieffektiva drivlinor, och hjälper våra kunder att forma framtidens mobilitetslösningar.

  



Hos oss får du en arbetsplats där du kan växa, påverka och vara med och driva teknikutvecklingen framåt – som gör verklig skillnad för framtidens mobilitet!

  


En omväxlande roll med stort eget ansvar!

  


**Intresserad?**  

I den här rekryteringsprocessen tillämpar vi löpande urval. Rekryteringsprocessen kan gå snabbt och tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdatum.

  



Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!


**About AVL**
-------------


AVL is one of the world’s leading mobility technology companies for development, simulation and testing in the automotive industry, and beyond. We provide concepts, solutions and methodologies in fields like vehicle development and integration, e-mobility, automated and connected mobility (ADAS/AD), and software for a greener, safer, better world of mobility.


Find out more: www.avl.com


**You are interested in a job at AVL but you are not sure how to apply or want to know what happens after you send your application?**
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Check out our step-by-step guide**


**AVL is not just about cars. It's about changing the future. Together.**
-------------------------------------------------------------------------

title: Diagnostics Design & Verification Engineer
description:
Are you passionate about building robust, intelligent diagnostic systems for next‑generation automotive technologies?
  
Mpya Sci & Tech is a company built by engineers – for engineers. We’ve created a workplace where you, as an employee, are always at the center. In everything we do, we strive for a high level of involvement and responsiveness to our employees' thoughts about their future roles and careers. Together, we are building a strong, inclusive, curious, and open-minded culture that offers great opportunities for our team members. We want you to work on assignments that you are passionate about, grow professionally, and maintain a healthy work–life balance.
  
About the RoleAs a Diagnostics Design & Verification Engineer you will play a key role in shaping system reliability, safety, and serviceability throughout the product lifecycle. In this role, you will collaborate closely with system architects, embedded engineers, and product owners to design, implement, and verify state‑of‑the‑art diagnostic solutions.Responsibilities
  
Analyze system architectures to identify failure modes and diagnostic needs.
  
Define diagnostic concepts, monitoring strategies, and mitigation mechanisms.
  
Develop detailed system and software diagnostic requirements in accordance with ASPICE (SYS/SWE).
  
Structure, configure, and maintain DTCs (Diagnostic Trouble Codes) and UDS services.
  
**Ensure compliance with key automotive standards:** ISO 14229, SAE J2012, SAE 1979.
  
Design, implement, and execute diagnostic test cases for embedded systems.
  
Specify datapoints for backend analytics, predictive maintenance, and fleet insights.
  
Maintain diagnostic databases for manufacturing and aftermarket stakeholders.
  
Monitor and support the execution of the organization’s test strategy.
  
Perform hands‑on vehicle and rig testing, including fault injection.
  
Conduct system‑level verification to ensure diagnostic performance meets requirements.
  
  

Required Qualifications
  
Experience working as a System Design Engineer, collaborating closely with electrical engineers, product owners, and cross‑functional teams.
  
Deep understanding of embedded systems and their lifecycle.
  
Hands-on experience with embedded software and hardware design.
  
**Strong knowledge of automotive communication protocols:** CAN, LIN, Ethernet, UDS, XCP.
  
Experience with HIL (Hardware‑in‑the‑Loop) testing environments.
  
Ability to read, interpret, and analyze code.
  
Practical experience with vehicle and test‑rig diagnostics and measurement.
  
Proficiency with tools such as Python, Excel, Wireshark, DLT Viewer.
  
Familiarity with Linux/WSL environments.
  
Valid Swedish B‑category driving license.
  
  

Preferred Qualifications
  
Experience working with AUTOSAR and POSIX-based environments.
  
Knowledge of aftermarket onboard diagnostics and service‑oriented tooling.
  
Understanding of emission‑related monitor design and OBD legislation.
  
Background in system architecture development and/or project management.
  
  

Who are we?At Mpya Sci & Tech, we believe in a sustainable working life, and we’re building a culture where you can:
  
Be Dedicated
  
Be Brave and Curious
  
Be Inclusive and Allowing
  
  

We believe that real talent lies in those who dare to keep growing throughout life. With deep industry knowledge and years of experience, we’ve built a forward-thinking company – in our own way.
  
Your application
  
If you are driven by technical depth, system level thinking, and solving real-world diagnostic challenges, we would love to hear from you! For questions about the position, feel free to contact Patrik Artman, 0733-908035 or patrik.artman@mpyascitech.com. We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Senior Quality Assurance Engineer
description:
ASSA ABLOY Global Solutions AB is looking for a hands-on Senior Quality Assurance Engineer to join our team in Stockholm or Landskrona and help strengthen and evolve the quality of our IoT‑based access control solutions.
  
In this role, you will work at the system level, validating end‑to‑end solutions built on Linux‑based hardware platforms, connected devices, and networked ecosystems. You will play a key part in building and improving our test automation capabilities, while still actively engaging in manual and exploratory system testing.
  
You’ll join a cross‑functional agile team working closely with developers, other test engineers, and the Product Owner, contributing to predictable, high‑quality releases. This role offers a rare opportunity to combine software testing, automation, hardware‑based testing, and system‑level problem solving in a real‑world environment. In this role, you’ll thrive in a culture that values engineering excellence, ownership, and continuous learning, empowering you to build a career you can be proud of.
  
What you will do as our Senior Quality Assurance Engineer
  
As a Senior Quality Assurance Engineer, you will be responsible for ensuring the quality, reliability, and robustness of our systems across software, hardware, and networking layers. You will work hands‑on with both manual exploratory testing and test automation, contributing to quality throughout the entire development lifecycle while collaborating closely with developers and the Product Owner.
  
  

**For example, you would:**  

Design, execute, and maintain system‑level, end‑to‑end, and release test scenarios, balancing exploratory manual testing with a growing level of automation to ensure high confidence in product quality.
  
Develop and evolve automated test suites in Python (e.g. pytest), maintaining and improving the test automation framework and integrating automated tests into CI pipelines as coverage and maturity increase.
  
Prepare, configure, and maintain test environments and physical test rigs, including Linux‑based hardware, network devices, and supporting utilities (such as Raspberry Pi‑based setups, readers, and locks), enabling reliable and repeatable testing.
  
Perform system‑level and hardware‑based testing, validating interactions between software, hardware, networking, and external devices in complex, real‑world environments.
  
Analyze system logs, traces, and network traffic to isolate faults and identify root causes, and produce high‑quality defect reports with clear reproduction steps, analysis, and supporting evidence.
  
Create and maintain test cases, test plans, and documentation in Jira and Confluence, while working closely with developers and the Product Owner to clarify requirements, risks, and acceptance criteria, and continuously improve test processes, tools, and quality practices within the team.
  
  

The skills and experience you need
  
  

**We are looking for someone who has:**  

5+ years of experience in software testing and quality assurance, with a strong focus on system‑level, end‑to‑end, and exploratory testing in complex technical environments.
  
Solid hands‑on experience with test automation, including developing and maintaining automated tests in Python (e.g. pytest), and an interest in gradually increasing automation coverage over time.
  
Experience testing Linux‑based systems, with the ability to work comfortably in terminal environments and understand how software behaves at system level.
  
Practical experience with hardware‑adjacent or hardware‑based testing, including working with physical devices, test setups, or custom test rigs.
  
Strong analytical and troubleshooting skills, with experience investigating issues through logs, traces, and system behavior, and producing clear, high‑quality defect reports.
  
Experience working in cross‑functional, agile team environments, collaborating closely with developers and product roles, with fluency in English, spoken and written.
  
  

The ideal candidate is curious about how things work end‑to‑end and enjoys being hands‑on rather than working purely at a theoretical level. You are comfortable working in environments where test automation is still evolving and see value in automating once patterns and test needs are understood. Experience with networked devices, IoT or embedded systems, CI pipeline integration, networking concepts, or building custom test rigs is considered a plus, but not a requirement. Most importantly, you take ownership of quality, enjoy problem‑solving in complex systems, and are motivated by continuously improving tools, processes, and test practices together with your team.
  
What we offer
  
We’re passionate about providing amazing opportunities and benefits, so you can continue and progress a lifelong career with us – here’s what we have to offer:
  
Learning and career development opportunities, whether it’s online learning, management training or enhancing your skills.
  
A competitive salary
  
Hybrid model of working
  
Stable employment in a friendly international atmosphere
  
  

We review applications regularly, so don't wait.
  
We are building diverse and inclusive teams and encourage applications from all who can envision themselves working with us.
  
To ensure that your personal information is secure, we do not review any applications sent via email or post. If you have any questions about the role or the process, please send an email to Khalil Kabakibi, Talent Acquisition Business Partner, at Khalil.kabakibi@assaabloy.com.
  
Let's together create a safer and more open world!
  
To find out more about us, visit www.assaabloy.com.
  
We are the ASSA ABLOY Group
  
Our people have made us the global leader in access solutions. In return, we open doors for them wherever they go. With nearly 63,000 colleagues in more than 70 different countries, we help billions of people experience a more open world. Our innovations make all sorts of spaces – physical and virtual – safer, more secure, and easier to access.
  
As an employer, we value results – not titles, or backgrounds. We empower our people to build their career around their aspirations and our ambitions – supporting them with regular feedback, training, and development opportunities. Our colleagues think broadly about where they can make the most impact, and we encourage them to grow their role locally, regionally, or even internationally.
  
As we welcome new people on board, it’s important to us to have diverse, inclusive teams, and we value different perspectives and experiences.

title: Driver Simulation Engineer
description:
Driver Simulation Engineer – Open Standards
  
About Mpya Sci & Tech
  
Mpya Sci & Tech is a company built by engineers – for engineers. We’ve created a workplace where you, as an employee, are always at the center. In everything we do, we strive for a high level of involvement and responsiveness to our employees' thoughts about their future roles and careers. Together, we are building a strong, inclusive, curious, and open-minded culture that offers great opportunities for our team members. We want you to work on assignments that you are passionate about, grow professionally, and maintain a healthy work–life balance.
  
About the Role
  
We are now looking for a Driver Simulation Engineer with strong experience in open‑standard driving simulation to support one of our automotive customers.
  
You will work close to ADAS and autonomous driving development teams, focusing on virtual testing, scenario creation, and simulation integration using ASAM Open Standards. The work spans from scenario design to tool integration and automation, often in complex simulation environments.
  
What You Will Do
  
Develop and maintain simulation environment and scenarios using
  
ASAM OpenDRIVE, OpenSCENARIO, and OpenCRG etc.
  
Build and execute virtual driving scenarios for ADAS and automated driving validation
  
Implement supporting tooling and automation in Python and C++
  
Integrate simulation environments via ASAM OSI (Open Simulation Interface)
  
Support Driver‑in‑the‑Loop (DIL) and Software‑in‑the‑Loop (SIL) setups
  
Collaborate with perception, vehicle dynamics, and system engineers
  
Analyze simulation results and contribute to improved test coverage and realism
  
  

Who You Are
  
You enjoy working close to both software and vehicle behavior, and you value clean, reusable solutions built on open standards.
  
  

**We believe you have:**  

Experience within automotive simulation or virtual vehicle testing
  
  

**Hands‑on knowledge of ASAM Open Standards, especially:**  

OpenDRIVE & OpenSCENARIO
  
Strong programming skills in Python and C++
  
Experience working in Linux‑based development environments
  
The ability to collaborate in cross‑functional teams
  
  

**Nice if you are familiar with:**  

Driving simulators and co‑simulation frameworks such as CARLA, IPG CarMaker, dSPACE VEOS/ASM, SCANeR, or similar tools
  
Driver‑in‑the‑Loop (DIL) or Hardware‑in‑the‑Loop (HIL)
  
Unreal Engine–based simulators (e.g. CARLA, AirSim)
  
Sensor simulation (camera, radar, lidar)
  
Knowledge of ADAS or autonomous driving system validation
  
  

Who are we?
  
At Mpya Sci & Tech, we believe in a sustainable working life, and we’re building a culture where you can: Be Dedicated - Be Brave and Curious - Be Inclusive and Allowing
  
We believe that real talent lies in those who dare to keep growing throughout life. With deep industry knowledge and years of experience, we’ve built a forward-thinking company – in our own way.
  
Interested?
  
Feel free to reach out if you want to know more, Patrik Artman, Business Manager @ Mpya Sci & Tech, 0733-908035, Patrik.artman@mpyascitech.com

title: Senior Engineer - Analysis
description:
**About the role**
------------------



We are looking to strengthen our analysis team. You will join a team of eight aerodynamics engineer located in both Trollhättan and Bangalore. The role involves performing aerodynamic analyses—through CFD tools—with the purpose of optimizing the design of our OE components. You will need to balance aerodynamic performance taking into account thermal and structural requirements, which means close collaboration with and understanding of other engineering disciplines.  

This is a senior position, and therefore you will be expected to define plans for yourself and others, as well as mentor, guide, and review the work of your colleagues.  

The role also includes conducting analyses on existing products, which may involve issues that originate from the field and/or from production.  

Our tools, methods, and models are constantly evolving. Your ability to implement incremental improvements while also identifying larger development opportunities is essential, and you will collaborate with various universities as part of this work.

**Job description/ About the role/position**
--------------------------------------------

You should hold a Master’s degree with a focus on aerodynamics, numerical analysis (CFD), turbomachinery, and preferably aerospace. Several years of professional experience with gas turbines is desirable.  

You should also be a highly experienced user of ANSYS software, including FLUENT and CFX, as well as proficient in programming with Python and meshing tools such ICEM.

**Application**
---------------



This position is based in Trollhättan, Sweden, as such, the applicant should be able to gain the right to live and work in Sweden. Travel to other locations within Sweden as well as EU is expected.

  

Date for employment  

To be agreed. Target: July 2026

  

For more information please contact  

Rikard Nedar | Department Manager | GKN Aerospace Engine Systems Sweden. rikard.nedar@gknaerospace.com
